local: Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Sɔ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn bɔ tɩ sɔbiisi la wuu sũ-mã'asʋm, la nõŋlʋm, dee botɩ ya bɔ ẽ sɩra.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ nẽr-sɛba wuu n nõŋɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi la nõŋlʋm n ka ba'asrɩ la yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Mam Apolɩ la Atimõtɩ n de Azezi-krisi tõntõnɩba n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra yãma sɛba wuu n bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra dɛna Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba, la ya nẽŋadõma, la ya yel-bɩsrɩba n boe Filipi.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ mɛ a yel-sõnnɛ ya ĩyã wakatɛ sɛka woo tɩ mam tẽegɛ ya yelle.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: Wakatɛ wuu tɩ mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ ya wuu ĩyã la, mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ la sũ-yẽlga.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: yãma n sõŋɛ mam la kõ-yẽlga la tõonɛ halɩ pɔspɔsɩ daarɛ wa paam zĩna la ĩyã.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: Mam mi sɩra sɩra tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n pɔsɛ tõon-sõŋɔ ẽŋa ya sũure pʋam na, wʋn ken tõm ẽ bɛla halɩ ka ba'asɛ Azezi-krisi lemŋo daarɛ.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: La masɛ mɛ tɩ mam tẽ'esɛ bɛla ya wuu ĩyã, se'ere n soe la, mam yɛm boe la ya lɛ mɛ. Bẽm ĩyã, la sãn dɛna mam n boe yʋ'a deem wã, bɩɩ mam n tɔgrɩ pa'ala nẽrba tɩ kõ-yẽlga la de la sɩra la, ya wuu lagɩm na mam mɛ yẽ Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n de mam kaset-dãana tɩ mam yɛm boe la ya wuu mɛ, mam nõŋɛ ya la Azezi-krisi nõŋlʋm.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: La mam n sosrɩ Nawẽnnɛ bõn-sɛka de la ya nõŋlʋm wʋn pa'asra daarɛ woo, la bãŋrɛ, la yɛm vẽlgrɛ.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: tɩ ya wʋn bãŋɛ sɛla n ãn sõŋa, tɩ Krisi lemŋo daarɛ ya wʋn dɛna pʋpeelem dõma ka tara dõrga.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: tɩ ya tõoma wʋn dɛna tõon-sõma n masɛ n ze'ele Azezi-krisi zẽ'am, tɩ la wʋn botɩ Nawẽnnɛ yẽ pẽka la nã'asgɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: M sɔbiisi, mam boorɩ mɛ tɩ ya bãŋɛ tɩ sɛla n ẽŋɛ mam na basɛ mɛ tɩ kõ-yẽlga la mõolgɔ sẽŋɛ nẽŋa.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: La basɛ tɩ nayire sʋdaasɩ, la nẽrba basɛba la wuu bãŋɛ tɩ mam n boe yʋ'a deem na de la Krisi tõoma ĩyã.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: La tɩ sɔbiisi zozo'e yẽ bʋraanɛ mɛ Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam, mam n boe yʋ'a deem na ĩyã, tɩ ba sũure kɛŋra pa'asra, tɩ ba mõola Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la ka zɔta dabeem.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: La de la sɩra tɩ nẽrba basɛba mõolɩ Krisi kõ-yẽlga la sũure ĩyã, la gẽelgɔ, la basɛba mõolɩ la pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ.

eng: They are motivated by love, because they know that Im put here to give a defense of the gospel.
local: Pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ dõma la mõolɩ ẽ na nõŋlʋm, ba mi tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n looge mam tɩ m tɔgɛ pa'alɛ tɩ kõ-yẽlga la de la sɩra.

eng: the others preach Christ because of their selfish ambition. They are insincere, hoping to cause me more pain while Im in prison.
local: La basɛba la mõolɩ Krisi kõ-yẽlga la gẽelgɔ, la dagɩ la pʋpeelem. Ba tẽ'esrɩ tɩ bõn-ẽŋa wʋn pa'asɛ mam na nãmsgɔ, mam n boe yʋ'a deem na.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: La bɛla dagɩ yelle, la sãn dɛna la pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ bɩɩ pʋtẽ'e-be'ego, lan de se'em wuu, Krisi kõ-yẽlga la mõolɛ mɛ, bɛla mam ɩtɩ sũ-yẽlga mɛ. La mam wʋn ken ɩta sũ-yẽlga mɛ.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: se'ere n soe la, mam mi tɩ yãma pʋ'ʋsgɔ ĩyã, la Azezi-krisi Sɩa sõŋrɛ ĩyã, bõn-ẽŋa wʋn ba'asõm bɔ mam na fãarɛ.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: Mam n boorɩ sɛla, dee tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla la, de la mam kãn ẽŋɛ sɛla baa ayɩla tɩ yãnnɛ yõkɛ mam. La de la mam tara bʋraanɛ lɛɛlɛ wã la wakatɛ wuu, basɛ tɩ Krisi yẽ nã'asgɔ mam ĩyã, la sãn dɛna mam vɔa mɛ, bɩɩ mam sãn ki mɛ.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: La sãn dɛna la mam, mam sãn vɔa, la de la Krisi ĩyã, la kũm de la yõorɔ bɔ mam.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: La mam sãn ken vɔa, mam wʋn tõm na tõon-sõma sõŋɛ nẽrba. Bɛla, mam ka mi mam n wʋn looge sɛka.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: Mam boe la yɛla bayi tẽŋasʋka, mam boorɩ tɩ m basɛ vɔm ẽna mɛ dee sẽŋɛ ka bɔna Krisi zẽ'am, bɛla n ãn sõŋa gãnna.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: La yãma ĩyã, mam sãn ken vɔa n ãn sõŋa gãnna.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: Mam mi tɩ bõn-ẽŋa de la sɩra. Bɛla, mam mi tɩ mam wʋn ken vɔa mɛ bɔna la ya wuu, sõŋɛ ya tɩ ya sẽŋɛ nẽŋa Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam, tara sũ-yẽlga.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: La mam sãn leme wa bɔna la ya lɛ, ya zuugo wʋn zẽkɛ pa'asɛ mam ĩyã Azezi-krisi doosgo la pʋam.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: La bõn-sɛka n gãnnɩ wuu, de la ya basɛ tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ ãna wʋ Krisi kõ-yẽlga la n pa'alɩ se'em na. Tɩ mam sãn wa'am ya zẽ'am bɩɩ m sãn ka wa'am, m wʋn wõm tɩ ya ze la kãŋkãŋɛ, tara yɛm ayɩla, lagɩm taaba la pʋtẽ'erɛ ayɩla mõrgra tõnna tɩ nẽrba bɔ'ɔra kõ-yẽlga la sɩra.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: Da basɛ-ya tɩ dabeem tara ya la bɛ'ɛba baa fẽfẽe, tɩ bɛla n wʋn pa'alɛ ba tɩ ba wʋn sã'am mɛ, la yãma wʋn yẽ la fãarɛ, bɛla ze'ele la Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ n ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ na, la dagɩ ya bɔ Krisi sɩra mã'a, la de la ya ken nãmsɛ a ĩyã.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Ya nãmsɛ wʋ yãma n yẽ mam n nãmsɛ se'em, dee wõnna tɩ mam ken nãmsra lɛɛlɛ wã.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Yãma n lagɩm na Krisi dɛna ayɩla la basɛ tɩ ya tara bʋraanɛ mɛ, tɩ a nõŋlʋm na bɛlsra ya. La yãma lagɩm na taaba la Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa, dee tara nõŋlʋm, la taaba zĩile.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: Lan de bɛla la, lagɩm-ya taaba la nõorɛ ayɩla tara nõŋlʋm, la yɛm ayɩla, la pʋtẽ'erɛ ayɩla, bɛla tɩ mam sũ-yẽlga wʋn zo'oge gãŋɛ.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Da ɩta-ya sɛla sɛla gẽela taaba la pa'al-m-mẽŋa, sikra ya mẽŋa tẽ'esra tɩ nẽrba basɛba la gãnnɩ ya.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Nẽra nẽra da tẽ'esra a mẽŋa mã'a sõŋrɛ yelle. Ɛɛra-ya ya taaba sõŋrɛ.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Tara-ya pʋtẽ'e-sɛka tɩ Azezi-krisi daan tarɩ la.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: Azezi-krisi la Nawẽnnɛ n de ayɩla la, a ka tẽ'esɛ tɩ ẽŋa n zõn na Nawẽnnɛ na, de la sɛla tɩ ẽŋa wʋn gʋrɛ kãŋkãŋɛ.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: A sike a mẽŋa mɛ, basɛ ẽŋa n ãn se'em na, dee lebge nẽrsaala, ẽŋɛ a mẽŋa tõntõnna, wa bɔna la nẽrsaalba lɛ.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: Ẽŋa n daan de nẽrsaala la, a sike a mẽŋa mɛ, sakɛ Nawẽnnɛ halɩ ki dɔ-puurŋa zuo.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Bɛla ĩyã tɩ Nawẽnnɛ zẽkɛ ẽ halɩ, bɔ ẽ yʋ'ʋrɛ n gãnnɩ yʋ'ʋra wuu.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: Tɩ Azezi ĩyã, bõn-sɛba wuu n boe saazuum, la tẽŋa zuo, la tẽŋa pʋam, wʋn ka dũma tẽŋa a nẽŋam pẽgɛ ẽ, a yʋ'ʋrɛ la ĩyã.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: Tɩ nẽra woo wʋn yetɩ, Azezi-krisi n de Zuudãana, tɩ la wʋn dɛna nã'asgɔ bɔ tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: Bɛla, m sɩr-nõŋrɩsɩ, mam n daan boe la ya lɛ la, ya daan sakrɩ mɛ wakatɛ wuu, la mam n ka boe ya zẽ'am wã, ken ɩta-ya gãnna bɛla. Tõnna-ya fãarɛ la tõoma sõŋa sõŋa la Nawẽnnɛ zʋa.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ n boe la ya lɛ tõnna, botɩ ya bɔɔra ẽŋa n boorɩ se'em, dee tãna ɩta ẽŋa n boorɩ se'em.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Ɩta-ya sɛla woo tɩ yõŋa, la nõkɛ'ɛma wẽ'a da bɔna.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: Tɩ ya wʋn dɛna nẽrba n ka tarɩ yelle, ãna sõŋa ka tara dẽgrɔ. Tɩ ya wʋn dɛna Nawẽnnɛ kɔma n ka tarɩ dõrga n boe nẽr-bɛ'ɛsɩ la nẽr-yaalsɩ tẽŋasʋka, yẽgra wʋ peelem dũnia wã zuo.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: wʋn pa'alɛ nẽrba yetɔga n bɔ'ɔrɩ vɔm. Ya sãn ẽŋɛ bɛla, ya wʋn botɩ mam zuugo zẽkɛ Krisi lemŋo daarɛ, pa'alɛ tɩ mam tõoma, la mam n mõrgrɩ la wuu dagɩ zãŋa.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Ba sãn kʋ mam, la wʋn ãna wʋ kãabgɔ pa'asɛ yãma n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra tɩ la ãna wʋ kãabgɔ bɔ ẽ na pʋam. Baa la sãn dɛna bɛla, mam sũure ãn yẽlʋm mɛ, la mam wʋn ẽŋɛ sũ-yẽlga la yãma wuu.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: Bɛla, ya mẽ tara sũ-yẽlga lagɩm na mam sɩrʋm.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: Mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi sãn sõŋɛ, la kãn yuuge dee tɩ mam tõm Atimõtɩ ya zẽ'am, tɩ m wʋn tã'agɛ bãŋɛ yãma n ãn se'em tɩ m sũure mã'agɛ.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: Nẽra ka boe mam zẽ'am n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ ayɩla la mam n fablɩ ya yelle, sãn dagna ẽŋa mã'a.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Nẽra woo zɩgrɩ la a mẽŋa yelle, la dagɩ Azezi-krisi yelle.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Ya mi Atimõtɩ n pa'alɛ ẽŋa n masɛ se'em, lagɩm na mam wʋ bia n lagɩm na a sɔ la, tõm kõ-yẽlga la tõoma se'em.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: Bɛla, mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ mam wʋn tõm na ẽŋa ya zẽ'am tɔtɔ, mam sãn wa bãŋɛ m yɛla la n wʋn ẽŋɛ se'em.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: La mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ sɩra sɩra la Zuudãana tɩ la sãn ẽŋɛ fẽe, mam mẽŋa wʋn wa'am ya zẽ'am.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: Mam tẽ'esɛ tɩ la ãn sõŋa tɩ mam tõm tɩ sɔbia A'epafroditi n de mam tõntõn-tadãana n lagɩm na mam nãmsɛ la, tɩ a leme wa'am ya zẽ'am, ẽŋa tɩ ya daan tõm, tɩ a tarɩ sõŋrɛ wa'am wa bɔ mam m nãmsgɔ la pʋam.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: A boorɩ mɛ halɩ la a sũure wuu tɩ a yẽ ya wuu, a sũure sã'am mɛ halɩ, yãma n wõm a bã'asɩ la ĩyã.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Asɩra, a daan bẽ'erɩ mɛ deege la a ki. Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ zoe a ninbãalga, la, la dagɩ ẽŋa mã'a ninbãalga, la po dɛna la mam mẽ ĩyã, tɩ mam da le yẽ sũ-sã'aŋɔ pa'asɛ.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Bɛla tɩ mam tõm ẽ ya zẽ'am tɔtɔ, tɩ ya sãn yẽ ẽ, ya sũure wʋn le ẽŋɛ yẽlʋm, tɩ mam mẽ sũ-sã'aŋɔ wʋn bo'oge.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: To'oge-ya ẽ la sũ-yẽlga wʋ lan masɛ, ẽn de tɩ sɔbia Zuudãana sore pʋam na. Nanna-ya nẽr-bãna taaba.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: Se'ere n soe la, a daan deege la a ki Krisi tõoma ĩyã, a põsɛ a yõorɛ mɛ sõŋɛ mam la sõŋrɛ sɛka tɩ yãma ka tã'agɛ sõŋɛ mam na.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: Sɛla n deege, m sɔbiisi, ɩta-ya sũ-yẽlga Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam. La ka nãmsrɩ mam tɩ m le gʋlsɛ bõn-bãna bɔ ya, se'ere n soe la, ba wʋn sõŋɛ ya mɛ tɩ sɛla da ẽŋɛ ya.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Guuse-ya ya mẽŋa la nẽr-sɛba n ãn wʋ baasɩ la, nẽr-bãma n tõnnɩ tõon-be'ero, dee mõrgra nẽrba botɩ ba wãta ĩyã mã'a la.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Tõma n pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ la a Sɩa pãŋa, dee ɩta sũ-yẽlga Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam, ka te'ege nẽrsaalba n ɩtɩ sɛla la, tõma n de nẽrba n wã wãaga mẽŋa mẽŋa.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: Nẽrsaalba sisgo sãn tarɩ nɩ yõorɔ, mam mẽ tarɩ nõorɛ mɛ tɩ m dɩkɛ m mẽŋa te'ege ba. Nẽra sãn tẽ'esɛ tɩ ẽŋa tarɩ nõorɛ tɩ a te'ege nẽrsaalba sisgo, mam n tara nõorɛ gãnna.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Ba dɔgɛ mam mɛ, dabsa anii daarɛ tɩ ba wã mam. Mam de la Ɩsrayɛlɩ nẽra, Abẽnzamẽ buuri, mam de la Ebre nẽra mẽŋa mẽŋa. La sãn dɛna Nawẽnnɛ lɔɔ la doosgo, mam de la Farisi nẽra.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: Mam daan mõ'ogɛ nifo mɛ lɔɔ la yelle halɩ daan nãmsɛ Azezi nẽrba. La sãn dɛna lɔɔ la sakrɛ, mam daan ka tarɩ dõrga.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: La bõn-sɛba wuu tɩ mam daan dɩkɛ tɩ la dɛna yõorɔ bɔ mam na, mam dɩkɛ ba wuu tɩ ba dɛna la zãŋa Krisi ĩyã.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Mam n bãŋɛ Azezi-krisi n de m Zuudãana n ãn sõŋa gãnna wuu la, mam bɩsɛ bõn-bãma wuu wʋ sɛla n ka tarɩ yõorɔ. Krisi ĩyã mam basɛ bõn-bãma mɛ, bɩsɛ ba wʋ sɔgrɔ tɩ m tã'agɛ yẽ Krisi.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: lagɩm na ẽ dɛna ayɩla. Mam ka le yetɩ la de la lɔɔ la sakrɛ ĩyã tɩ mam masɛ Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am, la de la mam n bɔ Krisi sɩra la ĩyã. Nawẽnnɛ n botɩ mam masɛ, mam n bɔ sɩra la ĩyã.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: Mam n boorɩ se'em wuu de la m bãŋɛ Krisi, la pãn-sɛka n basɛ tɩ a vo'oge la, la m lagɩm na ẽ nãmsɛ, ãna wʋ ẽn ãn se'em a kũm na pʋam.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: tɩ m tara pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ mam mẽ wʋn vo'oge.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: Mam ka yetɩ mam darɛ paagɛ bõn-sɛka tɩ mam boorɩ la mɛ, bɩɩ mam darɛ masɛ mɛ sɛla woo pʋam, mam ken mõrgra mɛ tɩ m paagɛ gʋrɛ ẽ, se'ere n soe la, Krisi dẽŋɛ gʋrɛ mam mɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: M sɔbiisi, mam ka tẽ'esɛ tɩ mam darɛ yãŋɛ gʋrɛ ẽ. Mam ɩtɩ la sɛla ayɩla, mam yĩnni bõn-sɛba n boe mam poorʋm na mɛ, dee mõrgra tɩ m yẽ sɛla n boe nẽŋa na.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: Mam zotɩ wɛ'ɛsa la nẽŋa tɩ m paagɛ a tɛka to'oge bɔ'a la tɩ Nawẽnnɛ wi mam tɩ m to'oge a yire Azezi-krisi ĩyã la.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Tõma sɛba wuu n bɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo pʋam na, tɩ tara-ya pʋtẽ'e-ẽna. La sɛla ayɩla yelle, ya sãn tara pʋtẽ'erɛ ayẽma, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn vẽlgɛ ya tɩ ya bãŋɛ ẽn de bõn-sɛka.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: La, lan de se'em wuu, tõma n sẽŋɛ paagɛ zẽ'e-sɛka wã, tɩ ken sẽnna wɛ'ɛsa zẽ'e-sɛka tɩ tɩ we'esɩ la.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: M sɔbiisi, lagɩm ɩta-ya mam n ɩtɩ se'em na, bɩsra-ya sɛba yel-ɩrɛ n ãn wʋ tõma n ɩtɩ se'em na, tɩ la dɛna mãmsgɔ bɔ ya.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Mam daan dẽŋɛ yele ya mɛ nõorɛ faa, la mam le yɛta ya mɛ la nintãm, tɩ nẽrba zozo'e n boe tɩ ba yel-ɩrɛ pa'ala tɩ ba de la Azezi-krisi kũm dɔ-puurŋa la bɛ'ɛba.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Nẽr-bãma n boorɩ se'em na n de ba wẽnnɛ, ba ba'asgɔ de la sã'aŋɔ. Ba dɩkrɩ la sɛla n de ba yãnnɛ wẽ'era ba yõ'orɔ, ba tẽ'esrɩ la sɛla n de dũnia bõnɔ mã'a yelle.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: La sãn dɛna tõma, tõma de la Nawẽnnɛ yire nẽrba, tõma gu'uri la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi n de tɩ Fãagra tɩ a ze'ele bilam wa'am.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: A sãn wa'am, a wʋn teege tõma ĩyã wã n põ'orɩ la mɛ, tɩ a ãna wʋ a mẽŋa ĩyã n tarɩ nã'asgɔ la. A wʋn dɩkɛ la a pãn-kãtɛ sɛka tɩ a tarɩ botɩ sɛla woo sakra a nõorɛ la, ẽŋɛ bɛla.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: Bɛla, m sɔbiisi, mam nõŋɛ ya mɛ bɔɔra tɩ m le yẽ ya, yãma n botɩ mam tara sũ-yẽlga, dee wʋn botɩ mam yẽ nã'asgɔ la. M sɔbi-nõŋrɩsɩ, zɛ-ya kãŋkãŋɛ bɛla Zuudãana doosgo pʋam.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: Mam belnɩ A'evodi, la Asẽntiisi tɩ ba tara nõorɛ ayɩla Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: La fõn mẽ, m tõntõn-tadãan-sõŋɔ, mam sosrɩ fʋ mɛ tɩ fʋ sõŋɛ pɔg-bãma. Ba daan lagɩm na mam mɛ, la Akelma, la mam tõntõn-taaba basɛba la, mõrgɛ tõm Krisi kõ-yẽlga la tõoma, tɩ ba wuu yʋ'ʋra gʋlsɛ vɔm gõŋɔ pʋam.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Ɩta-ya sũ-yẽlga daarɛ woo Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam. Mam le yɛta ya mɛ ɩta-ya sũ-yẽlga.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Basɛ-ya tɩ nẽrba wuu bãŋɛ ya sũ-bʋgsʋm yelle. Zuudãana la lemŋo lɛm mɛ.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Da fabla-ya sɛla sɛla yelle, la sɛla woo pʋam pʋ'ʋsra-ya sɔsra Nawẽnnɛ, la ya pʋ'ʋsra ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ, pa'alɛ-ya ẽ yãma n boorɩ sɛla.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ wʋn bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm n gãnnɩ nẽrsaalba bãŋrɛ wuu, tɩ a gu'ura ya sũure, la ya tẽ'esgɔ Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: M sɔbiisi, sɛla n deege, basɛ-ya tɩ ya pʋtẽ'era tẽ'esra sɛla woo n de sɩra, la sɛla woo n narɩ nã'asgɔ, la sɛla woo n masɛ, la sɛla woo n tarɩ pʋpeelem, la sɛla woo n ɩtɩ sũure yẽlʋm, la sɛla woo tɩ nẽrba yetɩ la ãn sõŋa, tẽ'esra-ya bõn-sɛba wuu n ãn sõŋa masɛ pẽka yelle.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Ɩta-ya bõn-sɛba tɩ mam zãsʋm ya, tɩ ya to'oge, sɛla tɩ ya wõm dee yẽ mam zẽ'am na, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ'ɔrɩ sũ-mã'asʋm na wʋn bɔna la ya lɛ.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: Mam ẽŋɛ sũ-yẽlga zozo'e mɛ Zuudãana doosgo pʋam, mam n yẽ tɩ yãma yãŋa le tẽegɛ mam yelle sõŋɛ mam na. Asɩra, mam mi tɩ yãma daan tẽ'esrɩ mam yelle mɛ, la ya daan ka yẽ la sore sõŋɛ mam.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: La dagɩ tɩ mam boorɩ la sɛla ĩyã tɩ mam yele bɛla. Mam zãsʋm mɛ ɩta sũ-yẽlga sɛla woo pʋam la bõn-sɛka tɩ mam tarɩ la.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: Mam tã nõŋɔ pʋam vɔa mɛ, la mam ken tãna bõntarsõm pʋam vɔa mɛ. Sɛla woo pʋam, la zẽ'a woo mam zãsʋm mɛ, tɩ la sãn dɛna mam di tɩgɛ mɛ, bɩɩ kɔm, bɩɩ mam tarɩ mɛ tɩ la seke, bɩɩ mam ka tarɩ, mam mi mam wʋn ẽŋɛ se'em mɛ.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Mam tã ɩta sɛla woo mɛ, Krisi n bɔ'ɔrɩ mam pãŋa la ĩyã.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: La baa bɛla, ya ẽŋɛ sõŋa, yãma n sõŋɛ mam m toogo la pʋam na.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Yãma Filipi dõma, yãma mẽŋa mi tɩ mam n daan pɔsɛ mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya, dee daan ze'ele Masedʋanɩ fõrgɛ la, mam ka to'oge sɛla Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba zẽ'am baa zẽ'a ayɩla, sãn dagna yãma mã'a zẽ'am.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: Se'ere n soe la, mam n daan boe Tesaloniki tẽŋa la, yãma daan tõm sõŋrɛ bɔ mam mɛ nõorɛ faa.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: La dagɩ tɩ mam eerɩ la bɔ'a, mam n boorɩ sɛla de la ya yẽ yɔɔrɔ zo'oge.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: Mam to'oge sɛla woo tɩ yãma bɔ mam na mɛ, la seke gãŋɛ mɛ. Mam n to'oge ya bɔ'a la tɩ A'epafroditi tarɩ wa'am na, mam tarɩ mɛ tɩ sɛla ka le pɔ'ɔgɛ mam. Bɔ'a bãma ãn wʋ sɛla yũuŋo n ãn yẽlʋm tɩ ya kãabɛ bɔ Nawẽnnɛ, tɩ a to'oge la sũ-yẽlga.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: Mam dãana Nawẽnnɛ n tarɩ bõn-sõma wuu tɩ la zo'oge gãŋɛ la, wʋn bɔ ya sɛla woo n wʋn sõŋɛ ya Azezi-krisi ĩyã.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Sɔ wʋn yẽ nã'asgɔ daarɛ woo wakatɛ n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Pʋ'ʋsɛ-ya Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu n dolɩ Azezi-krisi la. Tɩ sɔbi-sɛba n boe la mam na pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya, lan gãnnɩ wuu nẽr-sɛba n boe na-keko yire la pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Mam Apolɩ n de Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em, la tɩ sɔbia Atimõtɩ.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra yãma Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba n boe Kolɔsɩ, dɛna tɩ sɔbiisi n de sɩra dõma Krisi sore doosgo pʋam na. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi Sɔ a yel-sõnnɛ mɛ, tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ ẽ mɛ yãma ĩyã wakatɛ wuu.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: Tõma wõm ban tɔgrɩ yãma n bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra, dee nõŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba wuu se'em.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: yãma n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bĩŋe a yire gu'ura tɩ a bɔ ya la ĩyã. La de la yãma n dẽŋɛ wõm sɩra yetɔga n de Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la, n botɩ yãma tara pʋtẽ'erɛ ẽŋa.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: Kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa paagɛ yãma zẽ'am mɛ, wʋ ẽn paagɛ dũnia zẽ'esɩ wuu se'em na, la a ɩtɩ nẽrba sõŋa mɛ, tɩ ba sakra zozo'e, tɩ ba kãllɛ pa'asra. A mẽ ɩtɩ la bɛla yãma zẽ'am lan sẽŋɛ la daar-sɛka tɩ yãma wõm, dee bãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ sɩra sɩra la.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Yãma zãsʋm bõn-ẽŋa la A'epafrasɩ n de tõma tõntõn-tadãana tɩ tõma nõŋɛ la zẽ'am. A de la Azezi-krisi tõntõnna n de sɩra dãana tõnna bɔ'ɔra yãma.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: Ẽŋa n yele tõma Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa n basɛ tɩ yãma tara nõŋlʋm se'em.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Bɛla tɩ lan sẽŋɛ la daar-sɛka tɩ tõma wõm yãma yelle la, tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ yãma ĩyã wa paam lɛɛlɛ wã. Tõma sosrɩ ẽ tɩ a botɩ ya bãŋɛ ẽŋa n boorɩ se'em sõŋa sõŋa, la ya tara yɛm, la bãŋrɛ wuu tɩ Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa bɔ'ɔrɩ.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: Tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ wʋn masɛ wʋ Zuudãana la n boorɩ se'em, tɩ la paagɛ a yɛm sɛla woo pʋam. Tɩ ya wʋn tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu, dee bãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ pa'asɛ.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Nawẽnnɛ wʋn bɔ ya pãŋa sɛla woo pʋam a na'am pãn-kãtɛ la ĩyã, tɩ ya wʋn wĩbe sɛla woo pʋam la sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ la sũ-yẽlga, ẽŋa n basɛ tɩ ya tãna wʋn po to'oge bõn-sõma tɩ a bĩŋe tɩ a bɔ a nẽrba a so'olʋm n de peelem pʋam na.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Nawẽnnɛ fãagɛ tɩ mɛ lika pãŋa pʋam, tarɩ tɩ sẽŋɛ a Bi-nõŋrɛ so'olʋm pʋam.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Ẽŋa ĩyã tõma yẽ fãarɛ mɛ, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ basɛ tɩ tõon-be'ero taalɛ.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Azezi-krisi de la Nawẽnnɛ tɩ ba ka yẽtɩ la wõnnɛ. Ẽŋa n de bõn-sɛba n nãam na wuu yiɛn dãana.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: La doose la ẽŋa tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nãam sɛla woo, bõn-sɛba n boe dũnia zuo la saazuum, bõn-sɛba tɩ ba yẽtɩ, la bõn-sɛba tɩ ba ka yẽtɩ, bõn-sɛba n tarɩ na'am, la zuudãandõma, la pãnsɩ dõma, la kɛ'ɛndõma wuu. La doose la ẽŋa tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nãam sɛla woo, tɩ la dɛna a bõnɔ.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Ẽŋa n dẽŋɛ sɛla woo bɔna, la de la ẽŋa ĩyã tɩ sɛla woo ken bɔna a zẽ'am.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Ẽŋa n de a nẽrba n de a ĩyã la zuudãana. Ẽŋa n de sɛla woo pɔspɔsɩ dãana, ẽŋa n de pɔspɔsɩ dãana n vo'oge dee basɛ kũm tɩ a dɛna sɛla woo nẽŋadãana.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: La paagɛ la Nawẽnnɛ yɛm tɩ a basɛ tɩ ẽŋa n ãn se'em na wuu, Azezi mẽ ãna bɛla.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Dee botɩ la doose la Azezi tɩ sɛla woo, la ẽŋa naagɛ taaba, la de la Azezi n ki kũm dɔ-puurŋa zuo tɩ a zɩɩm yese la ĩyã, n botɩ sũ-mã'asʋm bɔna sɛla n boe tẽŋa, la saazuum wuu, la Nawẽnnɛ tẽŋasʋka.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: La yãma mẽ daan zãagɛ mɛ la Nawẽnnɛ, ya daan de la bɛ'ɛba ya pʋtẽ'e-be'ero, la ya tõon-be'ero la ĩyã.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: La lɛɛlɛ wã, Nawẽnnɛ naagɛ ya mɛ la ẽŋa, a Dayʋa n lebge nẽrsaala ki la ĩyã, tɩ a tarɩ ya sẽŋɛ ka ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam la pʋpeelem, tɩ ya ka tara yelle, tɩ dõrga kana.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: Bɛla, dẽnɩ tɩ ya ken bɔ sɩra zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ, da basɛ tɩ sɛla zãagɛ ya la kõ-yẽlga la tɩ ya wõm tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla la. La de la kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa tɩ ba mõolɛ bɔ nẽrsaalba wuu n boe dũnia zuo la. Mam Apolɩ de Nawẽnnɛ tõntõnna tɩ m mõolɛ la kõ-yẽl-ẽŋa.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Lɛɛlɛ wã, mam sũure ãn yẽlʋm mɛ, mam n nãmsrɩ bɔ'ɔra yãma la ĩyã. Mam n nãmsrɩ wã de la Krisi nãmsgɔ n deege dɛna mam nãmsɛ bɔ a nẽrba n de a ĩyã la.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n looge mam tɩ m dɛna Azezi nẽrba tõntõnna mõolɛ a yetɔga la wuu bɔ yãma.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: Yetɔg-ẽŋa sʋgɛ mɛ yʋʋma yʋʋma, zamãana wuu wa paam zĩna, la lɛɛlɛ wã a yãŋa puke mɛ bɔ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ tɩ a basɛ tɩ a nẽrba la bãŋɛ yel-ẽŋa n daan sʋgɛ la na'am pãŋa n ãn sõŋa zo'oge se'em bu-zãŋsɩ tẽŋasʋka. Yel-ẽŋa n sʋgɛ la de la Krisi boe la ya lɛ, botɩ ya wʋn yẽ na'am pãŋa tɩ ya tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la a zẽ'am.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: La de la ẽŋa yelle tɩ tõma mõolɩ, kã'ana nẽra woo, dee zãsna nẽra woo la yɛm tɩ tɩ botɩ nẽra woo masɛ sɛla woo pʋam Krisi doosgo pʋam ka ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: La de la bɛla ĩyã tɩ mam tõnna dee mõrgra. La de la Krisi pãn-kãtɛ tɩ a bɔ mam zozo'e la n botɩ mam tõnna bɛla.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: Mam boorɩ tɩ ya bãŋɛ la mam n mõrgɛ tõnna se'em yãma ĩyã, la nẽr-sɛba n boe Laodise, la nẽr-sɛba wuu n nãn ka yẽ mam na nifo la ĩyã.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: Mam mõrgrɩ tɩ ya sũure n keŋe tɩ ya lagɩm taaba tara nõŋlʋm, dee tara yɛm zozo'e, tɩ ya bãŋɛ sɩra sõŋa sõŋa Nawẽnnɛ yelle n sʋgɛ n de Krisi la.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: La de la ẽŋa n tarɩ yɛm la bãŋrɛ wuu n sʋgɛ n tarɩ yõorɔ zozo'e.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: Mam yele ya wãna tɩ nẽra n da wa tɔgɛ nõ-yẽlʋm yetɔga pã'asɛ ya.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Baa mam n zãagɛ la yãma la, mam yɛm boe la ya mɛ, mam sũure ãn yẽlʋm mɛ, mam yẽ tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ dolɩ sore sõŋa sõŋa, la yan bɔ Krisi sɩra zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ la.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Bɛla, yãma n sakɛ tɩ Azezi-krisi de la ya Zuudãana la, bɔna-ya la ẽ lɛ.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ wʋ tɩa yẽga n kẽ tẽŋa zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ se'em na, ken bɔ-ya sɩra la ya sũure wuu wʋ ban zãsʋm ya se'em na, la ya pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ zozo'e.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Guuse-ya tɩ nẽra da dɩkɛ bãŋrɛ zãsŋɔ la yɛm yooro n de nẽrsaalba sisgo, la dũnia wã yɛla pã'asɛ ya, ba ka ze'ele Krisi zẽ'am.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ n ãn se'em wuu la, Krisi mẽ ãn na bɛla mẽŋa.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: La yãma n lagɩm na ẽ na, ya tarɩ sɛla woo mɛ tɩ la seke. Ẽŋa n de kɛ'ɛndõma, la pãnsɩ dõma wuu Zuudãana.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Yãma n lagɩm na ẽ na, ya wã mɛ, la dagɩ wã-sɛka tɩ nẽrsaalba wãtɩ tɩ la pa'alɛ tɩ ba de Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la. La de la Krisi n teege ya sũure tɩ ya lebge Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba, yese ya pʋtẽ'e-be'ero wuu.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: Ban daan mise ya ko'om pʋam na, la ãn wʋ ba lagɩm ya mɛ la Krisi laagɛ. La yãma mẽ lagɩm na ẽ mɛ vo'oge, yãma n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ pãŋa n botɩ Krisi vo'oge sɩra la ĩyã.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Yãma daan ãn wʋ ya ki mɛ Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am ya tõon-be'ero ĩyã, la ban ka dɔgɛ ya tɩ ya wãta dɛna Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la ĩyã. La Nawẽnnɛ botɩ ya lagɩm na Krisi mɛ vɔa, basɛ ya tõon-be'ero wuu taalɛ.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Tõma daan sɩ'ɩsɛ la Nawẽnnɛ lɔɔ, tõm tõon-be'ero n pa'alɛ tɩ tõma masɛ la sɩbgrɛ. La ban ka Krisi kũm dɔ-puurŋa zuo la, Nawẽnnɛ basɛ yel-ẽŋa taalɛ mɛ, tɩ a ka le bɔna tõma zuo.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: A botɩ pãnsɩ dõma wuu, la kɛ'ɛndõma wuu pãŋa sã'am mɛ, ẽŋɛ ba yãnnɛ nẽrba wuu nẽŋam pa'alɛ tɩ Krisi tã'agɛ ba mɛ kũm dɔ-puurŋa zuo.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Bɛla, da basɛ-ya tɩ nẽra le bɔ ya sisgo la sɛla tɩ ya diti, bɩɩ sɛla tɩ ya yũuri, bɩɩ yʋʋnɛ yʋʋnɛ kibsa, bɩɩ wõr-paalsɩ de'eŋo, bɩɩ vo'osgo dabsa yelle.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Bõn-bãma de la sɛla n sẽm na mãmsgɔ mã'a, la sɛla la mẽŋa de la Krisi.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Da basɛ-ya tɩ nẽra n ɩtɩ a mẽŋa wʋ a de la sik-m-mẽŋa dãana dee pʋ'ʋsra malɛkadõma, pã'asɛ ya yetɩ yãma n ɩtɩ sɛla de la zãŋa. Nẽr-ẽŋa dãana yetɩ Nawẽnnɛ n puke sɛla pa'alɛ ẽŋa, la a pa'alɩ la a mẽŋa zãŋa, se'ere n soe la, la de la nẽrsaalba pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ a tarɩ.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: A ka lagɩm na Krisi n de Zuudãana la. Krisi n de zuugo sõŋra ĩyã la wuu sɛla woo pʋam, tɩ kõb-suglsi, la zĩila botɩ ĩyã la zẽ'esɩ to'oto'ore toŋe taaba bɩta wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Yãma lagɩm na Krisi ki mɛ, tɩ a botɩ dũnia yɛla ka le tara pãŋa la ya lɛ. Bẽm tɩ ya ɩta wʋ dũnia wã n ken sɔna ya, basɛ tɩ ba le mõrgra ya tɩ ya sakra sisgo bãna wã n yetɩ:.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: «Da dɩkɛ, da leme, da kalʋm»?.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Sisgo bãma de la bõn-sɛba n sã'anɩ la ĩyã. Ba de la nẽrsaalba sisgo la ba zãsŋɔ.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Sisgo la zãsŋɔ bãna ãn wʋ yɛm tõoma la, ba pa'alɩ la pʋ'ʋsgɔ sore n ɩtɩ la yɛmleego, la sik-m-mẽŋa n dagɩ sɩra, la ĩyã nãmsgɔ yelle. La ba ka tã wʋn sõŋɛ nẽra tɩ a yõkɛ a mẽŋa la nẽrsaala yɛm n boorɩ se'em n de be'em na.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Yãma lagɩm na Krisi vo'oge mɛ, bɛla ɛɛra-ya bõn-sɛba n boe Nawẽnnɛ yire, zẽ'e-sɛka tɩ Krisi zĩ Nawẽnnɛ zʋʋgɔ la.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Basɛ-ya tɩ Nawẽnnɛ yire yelle pakɛ ya, da basɛ-ya tɩ dũnia yɛla pakɛ ya.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Se'ere n soe la, ya ki mɛ, la ya vɔm boe la Krisi lɛ Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: La Krisi n de tɩ vɔm na sãn wa puke, ya wʋn po naagɛ la ẽ puke la a na'am pãŋa.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Bɛla, basɛ-ya dũnia wã pʋtẽ'e-be'ero n de yalsɩ tõoma, la tõon-dẽgrɔ, la yalsɩ ɩrgɔ yɛmleego, la be'em yɛmleego, la nõŋɛ bõnɔ zozo'e. Nẽra n nõŋɛ bõnɔ zozo'e ãn wʋ nẽr-sɛba n kãabrɩ baga dee basɛ Nawẽnnɛ pʋ'ʋsgɔ la.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: La de la tõon-bãma n isgri Nawẽnnɛ sũure, tɩ a sɩbgra nẽr-sɛba n zagsrɩ a nõorɛ la.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Yãma n daan vɔa tõon-be'ero pʋam na, ya mẽ daan ɩtɩ la bɛla.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: La lɛɛlɛ wã, basɛ-ya bõn-bãma wuu. Basɛ-ya sũ-isgre, la sũ-yĩire, la pʋtʋʋlgɔ, la taaba tʋʋrɛ, la yetɔg-yaalsɩ mẽ ka le masɛ tɩ ba yese ya nõorʋm.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Da parna-ya bɔ'ɔra taaba. Yãma basɛ yãma n daan ãn se'em na mɛ la a yel-ɩrɛ.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: dee teege tara ãsʋm paalga. La de la Nawẽnnɛ n botɩ ya teege tara ãsʋm ẽŋa, dee malgra ẽ tɩ a ãna wʋ a mẽŋa la, tɩ ya wʋn tã'agɛ bãŋra ẽŋa sõŋa sõŋa pa'asra.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Nẽr-sɛba n tarɩ ãsʋm paalga wã, la sãn dɛna Zifdõma, bɩɩ bu-zãŋsɩ, bɩɩ sɛba n wã, la sɛba n ka wã, bɩɩ sɛba nini n ka pike, la weem nẽrba, bɩɩ yamsɩ, la sɛba n dagɩ yamsɩ, welgre ka le bɔna ba tẽŋasʋka. La de la Krisi mã'a n gãnnɩ sɛla woo, dee sɔna a nẽrba wuu.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Yãma de la nẽr-sɛba tɩ Nawẽnnɛ looge, a nõŋɛ ya mɛ, welge ya to'ore tɩ ya dɛna a nẽrba. Bɛla, zɔta-ya taaba ninbãalga, ɩta taaba sõŋa, sikra ya mẽŋa, dee tara sũ-bʋgsʋm, la sũ-mã'arɛ.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Da isgra ya sũure la taaba, nẽra sãn ẽŋɛ ya tuuge, basɛ-ya ẽ taalɛ wʋ Zuudãana n basɛ ya tõon-be'ero taalɛ se'em na.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Lan gãnnɩ wuu, tara-ya nõŋlʋm, tɩ ẽŋa n wʋn botɩ ya lagɩm taaba tara nõ-yẽnnɛ sõŋa sõŋa.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Basɛ-ya tɩ Krisi sũ-mã'asʋm la sɔna ya sũure, Nawẽnnɛ wi ya tɩ ya tara la sũ-mã'asʋm ẽŋa, lagɩm taaba dɛna ayɩla. Mina-ya yel-sõnnɛ pʋ'ʋsgɔ.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Basɛ-ya tɩ Krisi yetɔga la bɔna la ya lɛ sõŋa sõŋa. Tɩ ya tara yɛm zozo'e zãsna taaba, dee kã'ana taaba. Yõona-ya Nawẽnnɛ yõoma, yõona-ya yõom-sõma buuri wuu tɩ Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa bɔ ya la ya sũure wuu, pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Bõn-sɛba wuu tɩ ya ɩtɩ, la sãn dɛna la tõoma bɩɩ yetɔga, ɩta-ya la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ, dee pʋ'ʋsra tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ ĩyã.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Pɔgsɩ, sakra-ya ya sɩrba wʋ lan masɛ tɩ la ãna se'em Zuudãana doosgo pʋam.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Sɩrba, nõŋɛ-ya ya pɔgba, da tɔ-ya la ba.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Kɔma, sakra ya dɔgrɩba nõorɛ sɛla woo pʋam, tɩ la de la bɛla n ãn Zuudãana sũure yẽlʋm.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Sɔdõma, da ɩta-ya sɛla n wʋn basɛ tɩ ya kɔma sũure yĩige, tɩ ba bʋraanɛ da bo'oge.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Yamsɩ, sakra-ya sɛba n soe ya dũnia wã zuo sɛla woo pʋam, da ɩta-ya bɛla ba nifum mã'a tɩ ba pẽgɛ ya. Tõnna-ya la ya sũure wuu yãma n nannɩ Zuudãana la ĩyã.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Sɛla woo tɩ ya ɩtɩ, ɩta-ya la ya sũure wuu, wʋ ya ɩtɩ bɔ'ɔra la Zuudãana la, la dagɩ nẽrsaalba ĩyã.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: yãma n mi tɩ ya wʋn to'oge la yɔɔrɔ tɩ Zuudãana la bĩŋe tɩ a bɔ a nẽrba la ĩyã. La de la Krisi n de Zuudãana la tɩ ya tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Nẽr-sɛka n ɩtɩ sɛla n ka masɛ, a wʋn to'oge yel-ɩrɛ n ka masɛ yɔɔrɔ, se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ ka bɔkrɩ nẽrba.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: La sãn dɛna yãma n de zuudãandõma la, ɩta-ya sɛla n ãn sõŋa, la sɛla n masɛ bɔ'ɔra ya yamsɩ la. Mina-ya tɩ yãma mẽ tarɩ la Zuudãana n boe saazuum.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ da basɛ, mõrgɛ-ya la pʋ'ʋsgɔ, pʋ'ʋsra-ya ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya tõma mẽ ĩyã, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ tɔ sore tɩ tɩ mõolɛ a kõ-yẽlga la pa'alɛ nẽrba Krisi yelle n daan sʋgɛ la. La de la yel-ẽŋa ĩyã tɩ mam bɔna yʋ'a deem.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ tɩ m tã'agɛ tɔgɛ yel-ẽŋa vẽelga vẽelga wʋ lan masɛ tɩ m tɔgɛ se'em na.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Basɛ-ya tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ ãna sõŋa nẽr-sɛba n ka dolɩ Azezi la tẽŋasʋka, dɩkɛ-ya fol-sɛka tɩ ya tarɩ la wuu tõm sõŋa.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Basɛ-ya tɩ ya yetɔga ãna sõŋa wakatɛ wuu tara yẽlʋm wʋ yaarʋm na, dee bãŋɛ yan wʋn lerge nẽra woo se'em tɩ la masɛ.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: La sãn dɛna mam yelle, tɩ sɔbi-nõŋrɛ Atisiki n de Zuudãana tõntõnna n de sɩra dãana, n lagɩm na mam tõnna Zuudãana tõoma la, wʋn yele ya mam yelle wuu.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: Mam tõm ẽ ya zẽ'am na bɛla ĩyã, tɩ ya bãŋɛ tõma yɛla n ãn se'em, dee tɩ a wʋn keŋe ya sũure.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Mam tõm na ẽŋa, la A'onezim n ze'ele yãma zẽ'am, a de la tɩ sɔbi-nõŋrɛ n de sɩra dãana. Ba wʋn yele ya bõn-sɛba wuu n ɩtɩ kalam.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Aristarkɩ n lagɩm na mam bɔna yʋ'a deem na pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Amarkɩ n de Abarnabasɩ sõogɔ la mẽ pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Mam põn dẽŋɛ pa'alɛ yãma, yan wʋn ẽŋɛ se'em a ĩyã mɛ, a sãn wa'am ya zẽ'am, ya to'oge ẽ sõŋa.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Azezi sɛka tɩ ba wi'iri tɩ Azustusi la mẽ pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Nẽr-bãna mã'a n de Zifdõma n lagɩm na mam tõnna Nawẽnnɛ so'olʋm tõoma. Bãma n de nẽrba n bɔ mam bʋraanɛ.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: A'epafrasɩ n de ya nẽra la pʋ'ʋsra ya. Ẽŋa n de Azezi-krisi tõntõnna la mõrgrɩ mɛ pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ ya yelle ka basra tɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ, dɛna nẽrba n bɩ sɛla woo pʋam sakɛ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em wuu.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: Mam bɔ'ɔrɩ ya a kaseto tɩ a mõrgrɩ mɛ zozo'e yãma yelle, la Laodise dõma, la Hiyerapolisi dõma yelle.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: Tɩ sɔbi-nõŋrɛ Aluki n de logtore, la Ademasɩ pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Pʋ'ʋsɛ-ya tɩ sɔbiisi la n boe Laodise la, la Animfa, la Azezi nẽrba n lagsrɩ a yire la.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Ya sãn karẽŋɛ gõŋɔ wã ba'asɛ, ya basɛ tɩ ba ken karẽŋɛ ẽ bɔ Azezi nẽrba n boe Laodise la. La yãma mẽ karẽŋɛ Laodise dõma n wʋn bɔ ya gõn-sɛka la.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Yele-ya Arsipi tɩ a bɩsɛ tõon-sɛka tɩ Zuudãana bɔ ẽ na yelle sõŋa, a tõm ẽ sõŋa sõŋa ba'asɛ.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Mam Apolɩ n gʋlsɛ pʋ'ʋsgɔ wã la m mẽŋa nu'ugo, mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Tẽra-ya mam n boe yʋ'a deem na yelle. Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Bɛla tɩ tõma ka le tãna wʋn zĩ'ire, tɩ tõma tẽ'esɛ tɩ la ãn sõŋa tɩ tõma mã'a bɔna Atɛnɩ tẽŋa.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: dee tõm tɩ sɔbia Atimõtɩ n de Nawẽnnɛ tõntõnna n lagɩm na tõma mõola Krisi kõ-yẽlga la, tɩ a wa'am wa bɔ ya bʋraanɛ, tɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ Azezi doosgo la pʋam.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: Tɩ nãmsgɔ sɛka n nãmsrɩ ya la da basɛ tɩ ya nẽra baa ayɩla bʋraanɛ bo'oge Nawẽnnɛ sore la doosgo pʋam. Yãma mẽŋa mi tɩ la de la pẽrgrɛ tɩ tɩ nãmsɛ.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Tõma n daan boe la yãma la, tõma daan dẽŋɛ yele ya yetɩ, tɩ wuu wʋn yẽ nãmsgɔ mɛ. La ya mi tɩ la de la bõn-ẽŋa n bɛla n wa'am.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: Bɛla tɩ mam ka tãna wʋn zĩ'ire, tɩ mam tõm Atimõtɩ tɩ a wa'am wa bãŋɛ yãma n ãn se'em Azezi sore doosgo la pʋam, mam zotɩ mɛ tɩ Asũtãana wʋn pã'asɛ ya tɩ tɩ tõoma la lebge zãŋa.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: La lɛɛlɛ wã tɩ Atimõtɩ ze'ele ya zẽ'am leme wa'am, a tarɩ la kõ-yẽlga wa bɔ tõma, a pa'alɛ tõma la yãma n bɔ sɩra se'em, la yãma n tarɩ nõŋlʋm se'em, dee yetɩ ya ken tẽ'esra tõma yelle mɛ sõŋa sõŋa bɔɔra tɩ ya yẽ tõma, wʋ tõma n boorɩ tɩ tɩ yẽ yãma se'em na.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: Bɛla m sɔbiisi, yãma n bɔ sɩra se'em na keŋe tõma sũure mɛ tõma toogo, la tõma nãmsgɔ la pʋam.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Lɛɛlɛ wã, tõma le vɔa la sũ-yẽlga, yãma n ze kãŋkãŋɛ Zuudãana doosgo la pʋam na.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Tõma ka mi pʋ'ʋsgɔ sɛka tɩ tõma wʋn pʋ'ʋsɛ Nawẽnnɛ ya ĩyã, sũ-yẽlga sɛka tɩ yãma bɔ tõma a nẽŋam na ĩyã.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Tõma sosrɩ Nawẽnnɛ mɛ la tɩ sũure wuu, yʋ'ʋŋɔ la wʋntɛɛŋa, tɩ tɩ tã'agɛ le yẽ ya, sõŋɛ ya la sɛla n pɔ'ɔgɛ ya Azezi doosgo la pʋam pa'asɛ.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Tõma Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ mẽŋa, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn bɔ tɔ sore tɩ tɩ wa'am ya zẽ'am.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: Tɩ Zuudãana wʋn basɛ tɩ ya nõŋlʋm taaba ĩyã, la ya nõŋlʋm nẽrba wuu ĩyã pa'asra zozo'e wʋ tõma n nõŋɛ ya se'em na.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: A wʋn bɔ ya bʋraanɛ tɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ a sore la zuo la pʋpeelem, ka tara dõrga tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam, wakat-sɛka tɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi wʋn leme wa'am la a nẽrba wuu la.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: Sɛla n pa'asɛ, m sɔbiisi, yãma zãsʋm tõma zẽ'am mɛ yãma n wʋn ɩta se'em paagɛ Nawẽnnɛ yɛm. Yãma põn ɩta la bɛla. La tõma kã'anɩ ya mɛ, dee bɛlna ya la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ya malɩn ẽŋɛ gãŋɛ bɛla.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Yãma mi bõn-sɛba tɩ tõma daan to'oge tɩ Zuudãana Azezi zẽ'am pa'alɛ ya tɩ ya ɩta la.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ tɩ ya ãna se'em n wãna: Welge-ya to'ore dɛna pʋpeelem dõma, dee yõkɛ ya mẽŋa da tõnna yalsɩ tõoma.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: La ya nẽra woo bãŋɛ ẽŋa n wʋn tara a ĩyã se'em la pʋpeelem tɩ la ãna sõŋa.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: Da basɛ-ya tɩ yalsɩ tõoma yɛmleego tara ya, wʋ sɛba n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ n ɩtɩ se'em na.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Yel-ẽna pʋam, nẽra da kãn tõm a tadãana sɛla n ka ãn sõŋa, bɩɩ fã sɛla n de a bõnɔ. Tɩ daan põn dẽŋɛ yele ya, dee kã'an ya mɛ, tɩ Zuudãana wʋn sɩbgɛ sɛba n tõnnɩ tõon-be'ero bãma mɛ.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Nawẽnnɛ ka looge to tɩ tɩ tõnna tõon-dẽgrɔ, a looge to tɩ tɩ welge la to'ore tara pʋpeelem.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Bɛla, nẽr-sɛka n zagsɛ pa'algɔ ẽna, a ka zagsɛ nẽrsaala, a zagsɛ la Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ tɔ a Sɩa la.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: La sãn dɛna yãma n wʋn nõŋɛ sɔbiisi se'em yelle, la ka le dɛna tɩ gʋlsɛ bɔ ya. Nawẽnnɛ põn zãsʋm yãma ya wʋn nõŋɛ taaba se'em mɛ.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: La yãma sɩrɩ nõŋɛ ya sɔbiisi wuu n boe Masedʋanɩ so'olʋm wuu la bɛla. La tõma kã'anɩ ya mɛ tɩ ya malɩn ẽŋɛ gãŋɛ bɛla pa'asɛ.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Mõrgɛ ya mẽŋa vɔa la sũ-mã'asʋm, la ya bɩsra ya mẽŋa tõoma yelle, tõnna-ya la ya mẽŋa nu'usi dita, wʋ tõma n daan yele ya se'em na.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: Ɩta-ya bɛla, tɩ ya yel-ɩrɛ la basɛ tɩ ya yẽ nã'asgɔ nẽr-sɛba n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ na zẽ'am. La ya da zɛ gu'ura tɩ nẽra bɔ ya sɛla.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: M sɔbiisi, tõma boorɩ tɩ ya bãŋɛ la sɩra nẽr-sɛba n ki la yelle, tɩ ya sũure da sã'am wʋ nẽr-sɛba n ka tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla la.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Tõma n bɔ sɩra tɩ Azezi ki mɛ, dee vo'oge la, bɛla tõma ken bɔ sɩra mɛ tɩ sɛba n dolɩ Azezi dee ki la, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn botɩ ba bɔna la Azezi.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Zuudãana zãsŋɔ n wãna tɩ tõma yetɩ tɩ pa'alɩ ya: Wakat-sɛka tɩ Zuudãana la lemnɩ la, tõma sɛba n ken vɔa Zuudãana lemŋo daarɛ la kãn dẽŋɛ sɛba n ki la Zuudãana zẽ'am.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Se'ere n soe la, nõorɛ n wʋn bɔ, tɩ malɛkadõma naba tɔgɛ ke'enke'em, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ benkonne peebe, tɩ Zuudãana mẽŋa ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ yire sige, tɩ sɛba n dolɩ Azezi dee ki la dẽŋɛ vo'oge.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ lagɩm bãma, la tõma sɛba n ken vɔa la zẽkɛ sawara pʋam tɩ tɩ tʋ'ʋsɛ Zuudãana la saazuum, tɩ tɩ bɔna la Zuudãana la lɛ wakatɛ wuu.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Bɛla, kɛŋra-ya taaba sũure la yetɔg-bãna.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: M sɔbiisi, la ka le dɛna tɩ gʋlsɛ ya pa'alɛ wakatɛ, la dabs-sɛba tɩ bõn-bãma wʋn ẽŋɛ.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: Yãma mẽŋa põn mina sõŋa mɛ tɩ Zuudãana lemŋo la daarɛ wʋn ãna wʋ nayiga n ẽn wa'am yʋ'ʋŋɔ la.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: Nẽrba sãn wa yɛta tɩ: «Laafɛ la sũ-mã'asʋm boe», wakat-ẽŋa tɩ toogo wʋn wa'am di'ige ba wʋ pɔka virgre toogo la, la ba kãn yãŋɛ põsɛ.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: La yãma, m sɔbiisi, yãma dagɩ nẽrba n boe lika pʋam tɩ Zuudãana la daarɛ wʋn wa di'ige ya wʋ nayiga la.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Yãma wuu de la peelem nẽrba, yãma tõoma tõnnɩ la wʋntɛɛŋa. Tõma tõoma ka tõnnɩ yʋ'ʋŋɔ, tõma dagɩ lika nẽrba.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: Bɛla, tɩ da gĩsra-ya wʋ nẽrba basɛba la, tɩ nẽegɛ-ya mãasʋm tara tɩ mẽŋa sõŋa.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Sɛba n gĩsri, gĩsri la yʋ'ʋŋɔ, tɩ sɛba n yũuri dãam bugra, bugra yʋ'ʋŋɔ.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: La tõma n de wʋntɛɛŋa nẽrba la, tɩ tara tɩ mẽŋa sõŋa. La tɩ bɔ Azezi sɩra, dee tara nõŋlʋm wʋ kuto fuugo tɩ sʋdaaga dɩkɛ pĩ a yõ'ogɔ tɩ la gu'ura ẽ zɛbrɛ pʋam na. Dee basɛ tɩ fãarɛ la tɩ ya tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la, ãna wʋ kuto zuu-wannɛ gu'ura ya.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Nawẽnnɛ ka looge to tɩ a sũ-isgre sã'am tɔ, a looge to tɩ tɩ yẽ la fãarɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi ĩyã.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: Ẽŋa n ki tɩ ĩyã, tɩ a lemŋo daarɛ, tɩ sãn vɔa mɛ bɩɩ tɩ sãn ki mɛ, tɩ wʋn bɔna la ẽ lɛ.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: Bɛla, bɔ'ɔra-ya taaba bʋraanɛ, sõŋra taaba ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ Azezi doosgo la pʋam, wʋ yãma n põn ɩta se'em na.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: M sɔbiisi, tõma sosrɩ ya mɛ tɩ ya nanna sɛba n tõnnɩ ya tẽŋasʋka la, sɛba tɩ Zuudãana looge tɩ ba bɔna ya nẽŋa pa'ala ya Azezi sore la pʋam, dee kã'ana ya la.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Ẽŋɛ-ya sɛla n pa'alɩ tɩ yãma nannɩ ba mɛ, nõŋɛ ba zozo'e ba tõoma la ĩyã. Tara-ya sũ-mã'asʋm la taaba.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: M sɔbiisi, tõma sosrɩ ya mɛ tɩ ya kã'ana sɛba n ka boorɩ tɩ ba tõm na, dee bɔ'ɔra sɛba n ka tarɩ bʋraanɛ la bʋraanɛ, dee sõŋra sɛba n ka tarɩ pãŋa la, la ya mã'ara ya sũure la nẽra woo.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Guuse-ya tɩ nẽra da lebse a tadãana be'em, be'em ĩyã, mõrgɛ-ya ɩta taaba sõŋa, la nẽrba wuu sõŋa wakatɛ wuu.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Tara-ya sũ-yẽlga daarɛ woo.

eng: Pray continually.
local: Pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ wakatɛ wuu da basɛ.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: Sɛla woo pʋam pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ. Nawẽnnɛ boorɩ tɩ ya ɩta la bɛla Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Da gu'ura-ya Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa tõoma.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: Da pɔ'ɔra-ya yetɔg-sɛba tɩ nẽra to'oge Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am tɔgra bɔ'ɔra ya.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: Magra-ya sɛla woo bɩsra la ãn se'em, to'oge sɛla n ãn sõŋa.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: Dee lɔkra-ya yel-sɛba wuu n de be'em.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n de sũ-mã'asʋm dãana la mẽŋa wʋn basɛ tɩ ya dɛna ẽŋa mã'a nẽrba tara pʋpeelem. A wʋn gu ya ĩyã, la ya sɩa, la ya yɛm wuu tɩ ya kãn tara dõrga tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi lemŋo daarɛ.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n looge ya la de la sɩra dãana, a wʋn ẽŋɛ bɛla.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: M sɔbiisi, pʋ'ʋsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ bɔ'ɔra tɔ.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Pʋ'ʋsɛ-ya tɩ sɔbiisi la wuu la nõŋlʋm.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: Mam sosrɩ ya la Zuudãana yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ya karẽŋɛ gõŋɔ ẽna wã tɩ sɔbiisi la wuu wõm.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Mam Apolɩ, la Asilvẽ, la Atimõtɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra yãma sɛba n de tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi nẽrba n boe Tesaloniki.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: M sɔbiisi, tõma masɛ mɛ tɩ tɩ pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ daarɛ woo a yel-sõnnɛ yãma ĩyã. La ãn sõŋa mɛ tɩ tõma ɩta bɛla, se'ere n soe la, yãma n bɔ Azezi sɩra la sẽnnɩ nẽŋa mɛ zozo'e, tɩ yãma nẽra woo nõŋlʋm taaba ĩyã pa'asra.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Bɛla tɩ tõma tɔgra yãma yelle Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba lagsgɔ zẽ'a woo la sũ-yẽlga. Se'ere n soe la, yãma mõrgɛ mɛ zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ Azezi doosgo la pʋam ka basra, baa nẽrba n nãmsrɩ ya, la toogo n paarɩ ya la.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Bɛla pa'alɛ tɩ Nawẽnnɛ diti sarɩya la sɩra. Se'ere n soe la, yãma n nãmsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ so'olʋm yelle se'em wã, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn yetɩ ya masɛ tɩ ya kẽ a so'olʋm na pʋam.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ sɛla n masɛ, a wʋn botɩ sɛba n nãmsrɩ yãma la yẽ nãmsgɔ.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: dee basɛ tɩ yãma sɛba n nãmsrɩ la, lagɩm na tõma vo'ose wakat-sɛka tɩ Zuudãana Azezi wʋn ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ yire wa'am, la a malɛkadõma n tarɩ pãn-kãtɛ.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: la bug-zɩlɩsɩ wa sɩbgɛ sɛba n zagsɛ Nawẽnnɛ dee ka sakɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi kõ-yẽlga la.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Ba wʋn yẽ la sɩbgrɛ n de sã'aŋɔ n ka ba'asrɩ. La ba wʋn zãagɛ mɛ la Zuudãana kãn yẽ a na'am pãn-kãtɛ la.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: wakat-sɛka tɩ a wʋn wa'am na. Daar-ẽŋa, a wʋn wa'am mɛ wa to'oge pẽka la nã'asgɔ a mẽŋa nẽrba n bɔ ẽ sɩra la zẽ'am, la yãma po bɔna ba pʋam mɛ, yãma n sakɛ a kõ-yẽlga la tɩ tõma tɔgɛ bɔ ya la ĩyã.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Bɛla ĩyã tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ wakatɛ wuu ya ĩyã, tɩ a basɛ tɩ ya ãna sõŋa masɛ wʋ ẽŋa n wi ya tɩ ya ãna se'em na. La a wʋn bɔ ya pãŋa tɩ ya ɩta bõn-sõma sɛba wuu tɩ ya boorɩ tɩ ya ẽŋɛ, dee basɛ tɩ yãma n bɔ sɩra tõnna tõon-sɛba la tõm ba'asɛ.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Bɛla tɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi yʋ'ʋrɛ wʋn yẽ nã'asgɔ ya zẽ'am, tɩ yãma mẽ yẽ nã'asgɔ a zẽ'am. Bɛla wuu de la Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: M sɔbiisi, yãma mẽŋa mi tɩ tõma n daan wa'am ya zẽ'am na, la dagɩ zãŋa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: La sãn dɛna tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi lemŋo, la tõma n wʋn wa lagsɛ taaba a zẽ'am na yelle, m sɔbiisi, tõma sosrɩ ya mɛ.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: La ya ken mina tɩ ba daan nãmsɛ tõma mɛ dee tʋ tõma Filipi tẽŋa, dee tɩ tõma yãŋa wa'am yãma zẽ'am Tesaloniki. La Nawẽnnɛ daan bɔ tõma bʋraanɛ mɛ, tɩ tõma mõolɛ a kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya, baa nãmsgɔ la n daan zo'oge la.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: tɩ ya da basɛ tɩ ya yɛm yɔɔra tɩ dabeem tara ya, ya sãn wõm tɩ nẽrba yetɩ Zuudãana la lemŋo daarɛ paagɛ mɛ. Baa nẽra sãn yele ya yetɩ la de la Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa n pa'alɛ ẽŋa, bɩɩ a sãn yetɩ tõma n tɔgɛ, bɩɩ a sãn yetɩ tõma n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ, da kãn sakɛ-ya.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Tõma n pa'alɩ pa'alg-sɛba la dagɩ tuure, bɩɩ pʋtẽ'e-be'ero pa'algɔ. La tõma ka ɩtɩ yɛmkẽgsɩga pã'asra nẽrba.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: Da basɛ-ya tɩ nẽra pã'asɛ ya, baa lan de se'em wuu. Lan dẽŋɛ daar-ẽŋa n wʋn wa'am, dẽnɩ tɩ nẽrba zozo'e isge tulge zɛbra la Nawẽnnɛ, tɩ nẽr-sɛka n de tõon-be'ero dãana la wʋn wa'am wa puke a mẽŋa, ẽŋa n de nẽr-sɛka n wʋn sã'am.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: La de la Nawẽnnɛ n bɩsɛ tɩ tõma masɛ tɩ a dɩkɛ a kõ-yẽlga la ẽŋɛ tõma nu'usum. Bɛla, tõma ka mõolɩ tɩ la ẽŋɛ nẽrsaalba sũure yẽlʋm, tõma mõolɩ tɩ la ẽŋɛ la Nawẽnnɛ n vẽesrɩ mina tɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ n ãn se'em na sũure yẽlʋm.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: A wʋn sise bõn-sɛba wuu tɩ nẽrba nã'asrɩ, dee yetɩ ba de la wẽnnɛ, a wʋn zẽkɛ a mẽŋa mɛ gãnna bõn-bãma wuu. Halɩ, a wʋn põn sẽŋɛ ka kẽ la Nawẽnnɛ deego la pʋam zĩ'ire yetɩ ẽŋa de la Nawẽnnɛ.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Yãma mi sõŋa tɩ tõma ka dɩkɛ nõ-yẽlʋm pã'asɛ nẽrba, la tõma ka dɩkɛ kõnkomã'asʋm tɔgɛ tɩ tɩ to'oge sɛla, Nawẽnnɛ n de tõma kaset-dãana.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: Mam n daan ken bɔna yãma zẽ'am na, mam daan yele ya bɛla wuu mɛ. Yãma ka tẽrɩ?.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others.
local: Tõma ka ɛ pẽka nẽrsaalba zẽ'am, tõma ka ɛ yãma zẽ'am, bɩɩ nẽrba basɛba zẽ'am.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: La yãma mi tɩ sɛla n boe gu'ura tɩ tõon-be'ero dãana la nãn ka puke, halɩ tɩ wakatɛ la wʋn wa paagɛ.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: La tõma daan tarɩ nõorɛ mɛ, tõma n de Krisi Tõntõnɩba la ĩyã, la tõma daan ka ẽŋɛ bɛla. Tõma daan tarɩ la sũ-bʋgsʋm ya zẽ'am, wʋ pɔka n bɩsrɩ a kɔma yelle sõŋa se'em na.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: Tõon-be'ero pãŋa n sʋgɛ põn tõnna mɛ. La sɛka n nãn gu'uri ẽ na, wʋn wa fõrgɛ mɛ dee basɛ folle.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: Tõma n nõŋɛ ya la ĩyã, tɩ tõma daan mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la n ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am na bɔ ya. La, la dagɩ bɛla mã'a, tõma daan sakɛ mɛ tɩ dɩkɛ tɩ vɔm bɔ ya, tõma nõŋɛ ya mɛ halɩ zozo'e.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Bɛla tɩ tõon-be'ero dãana la yãŋa wʋn puke. La tõma Zuudãana Azezi n wʋn leme wa'am tɩ a nõorɛ sapebsʋm kʋ ẽ. La a lemŋo la na'am pãŋa wʋn sã'am a pãŋa fasɩ.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: M sɔbiisi, yãma tẽrɩ tõma n daan tõm nãmsɛ se'em, tõma n daan mõolɩ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya la. Tõma daan tõm na wʋntɛɛŋa la yʋ'ʋŋɔ, tõma daan ka boorɩ tɩ tõma dia yelle dɛna nãmsgɔ bɔ ya nẽra baa ayɩla.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: La sãn dɛna tõon-be'ero dãana la n wʋn wa'am na, a wʋn tara la Asũtãana pãŋa ɩta bõn-yãlma la yel-kɩrsɩ, la yɛla buuri zozo'e n de pã'asgɔ.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Yãma mi tõma n daan boe yãma sɛba n bɔ sɩra zẽ'am na, tõma yel-ɩrɛ n ãn se'em, la Nawẽnnɛ mẽ mi mɛ. Tõma yel-ɩrɛ daan ãn na sõŋa sõŋa, masɛ tɩ dõrga kana.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: A wʋn tõm na be'em buuri to'oto'ore pã'asɛ nẽr-sɛba n wʋn yẽ sã'aŋɔ la, ban zagsɛ ka nõŋɛ sɩra to'oge ẽ wʋn yẽ fãarɛ la ĩyã.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Yãma mi tɩ tõma daan ãn wʋ sɔ n ãn se'em la a kɔma la, yãma nẽra woo ĩyã.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: Ban ka sakɛ sɩra la, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ basɛ tɩ ba pʋtẽ'era botɩ ba tuuge sakɛ põmpɔrŋɔ.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: Tõma keŋe ya sũure mɛ, bɔ ya bʋraanɛ, pa'alɛ ya yetɩ ya dɔla so-sɛka n masɛ Nawẽnnɛ yɛm, ẽŋa n wi ya tɩ ya kẽ a so'olʋm pʋam po dita na'am.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: Bɛla tɩ nẽr-sɛba wuu n ka sakɛ sɩra, dee bɔɔra tõon-be'ero la wʋn yẽ sarɩyadia n de sã'aŋɔ.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Tõma n daan mõolɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ ya la, ya daan to'oge ẽ, sakɛ tɩ la de la kõ-yẽlga n ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am, a ka ze'ele nẽrsaalba zẽ'am. Asɩra, la de la Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga n boe yãma sɛba n bɔ sɩra la sũure pʋam tõnna. Bɛla tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ wakatɛ wuu bõn-ẽŋa ĩyã.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: La ãn sõŋa tɩ tõma pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ wakatɛ wuu yãma n de tɩ sɔbiisi tɩ tɩ Zuudãana nõŋɛ la ĩyã. Se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ looge ya la halɩ pɔspɔsɩ, tɩ a Sɩa botɩ ya dɛna a nẽrba tara pʋpeelem, dee sakɛ sɩra yẽ fãarɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: M sɔbiisi, Nawẽnnɛ nẽr-kʋʋŋɔ n dolɩ Azezi-krisi n boe Zude tẽnsɩ pʋam n yẽ nãmsgɔ sɛba la, yãma mẽ yẽ la nãmsgɔ bãma. Yãma buuri la n nãmsrɩ yãma se'em na, Zifdõma mẽ nãmsɛ ba nẽr-sɛba n dolɩ Azezi-krisi la bɛla.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: La de la bɛla ĩyã tɩ Nawẽnnɛ doose la tõma kõ-yẽlga la wi ya tɩ ya po yẽ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi na'am pãŋa la.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: Bãma n daan kʋ Zuudãana Azezi, la Nawẽnnɛ nõtɔ'ɔsrɩba, dee mẽ nãmsɛ tõma. Ba ɩtɩ la sɛla n ka ãn Nawẽnnɛ sũure yẽlʋm, ba de la nẽrba wuu bɛ'ɛba.
