eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: Bɛla, m sɔbiisi, mõrgɛ-ya zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ, tara yel-sɛba tɩ tõma zãsʋm ya, bɩɩ gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ bɔ ya la.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: Ba gu'uri tõma mɛ tɩ tɩ da mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la bɔ bu-zãŋsɩ tɩ ba yẽ fãarɛ. Bɛla tɩ ba tõnna tõon-be'ero pa'asra wakatɛ wuu. La ba'asgɔ, Nawẽnnɛ sũ-isgre boe ba zuo.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: Tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi, la tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ n nõŋɛ tɔ dee ẽŋɛ tɩ yel-sõnnɛ bɔ tɔ bʋraanɛ n ka ba'asrɩ, dee botɩ tɩ tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura bõn-sõma sɛba tɩ tɩ sakɛ la.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: M sɔbiisi, lan daan pẽrgɛ tɩ tõma ze'ele ya zẽ'am fõrgɛ wakatɛ fẽe la, tɩ ka le yẽta taaba la nini, la tõma pʋtẽ'era ken bɔna la ya lɛ mɛ, tɩ yãma sɩa tara tõma, tɩ tõma mõrgra bɔɔra tɩ tɩ le yẽ ya.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: A wʋn keŋe ya sũure, dee bɔ ya pãŋa tɩ ya ẽŋɛ sɛla wuu n ãn sõŋa, la ya tɔgɛ sɛla n ãn sõŋa.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: Bɛla tɩ tõma daan bɔɔra tɩ tɩ leme ya zẽ'am. La mam mẽŋa Apolɩ mõrgɛ mɛ nõorɛ faa tɩ m leme ya zẽ'am, tɩ Asũtãana gu tõma.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: La de la yãma tɩ tõma tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura, yãma n wʋn bɔ tõma sũ-yẽlga, la de la yãma n wʋn botɩ tõma yẽ nã'asgɔ tõma Zuudãana Azezi nẽŋam a lemŋo daarɛ.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: La de la bɛla, yãma ĩyã tɩ tõma wʋn yẽ nã'asgɔ la sũ-yẽlga.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: Sɛla n deege, m sɔbiisi, sose-ya Nawẽnnɛ bɔ tɔ, tɩ tɩ Zuudãana kõ-yẽlga la ken saagɛ pa'asɛ dee tɩ nẽrba pẽgra ẽ, wʋ la ãn se'em yãma zẽ'am na.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Ken sose-ya ẽ tɩ a fãagɛ tɔ la nẽr-wẽensɩ, la nẽr-bɛ'ɛsɩ, se'ere n soe la, la dagɩ nẽrba wuu n sakɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: La Zuudãana la de la sɩra dãana, a wʋn botɩ ya ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ, dee gu'ura ya tɩ be'em dãana la da yãŋɛ ya.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: Zuudãana la ĩyã tõma bɔ yãma sɩra mɛ, tõma mi tɩ ya ɩtɩ la tõma n yele ya se'em na, la ya wʋn ken ɩta la bɛla.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: Zuudãana la wʋn basɛ tɩ ya tara Nawẽnnɛ nõŋlʋm, dee mõrgɛ zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ wʋ Krisi la.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: M sɔbiisi, tõma yetɩ ya la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ya zãagɛ ya mẽŋa la sɔbiisi sɛba wuu n de zẽyãgsɩ vɔa yooryooro ka dɔla pa'algɔ sɛba tɩ tõma pa'alɛ ya la.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Yãma mẽŋa mi sõŋa tɩ la masɛ mɛ tɩ ya ɩta tõma n daan ɩtɩ se'em na. Tõma n daan boe ya zẽ'am na, tõma daan ka tarɩ zẽyãgrɛ.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: la tõma ka diti nẽra dia zãŋa, tõma daan tõnnɩ na wʋntɛɛŋa la yʋ'ʋŋɔ nãmsra zozo'e ka bɔɔra tɩ tõma dia yelle dɛna nãmsgɔ bɔ ya nẽra baa ayɩla.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: Tõma n daan ɩtɩ bɛla la, la dagɩ tɩ tõma ka tarɩ la sore tɩ tɩ sose sõŋrɛ ya zẽ'am, tõma daan tõnnɩ tɩ pa'alɛ ya, tɩ ya mẽ ɩta la bɛla.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
local: Tõma n daan boe ya zẽ'am na, tõma daan yele ya yetɩ: «Sɛka n ka boorɩ tɩ a tõm, a da di.».

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: La tõma wõm tɩ nẽrba basɛba n boe ya zẽ'am dɛna zẽyãgsɩ vɔa yooryooro, dee kẽ'era nẽrba yɛla pʋam.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: Tõma yetɩ nẽr-bãma mɛ, dee kã'ana ba la Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yʋ'ʋrɛ tɩ ba yõkɛ ba mẽŋa mõrgɛ tõm bɩsɛ ba mẽŋa yelle.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: La sãn dɛna yãma, m sɔbiisi, da kãn targɛ-ya la tõon-sõma ɩrgɔ.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Nẽra sãn ka sakɛ bõn-sɛba tɩ tõma yele ya gõŋɔ wã pʋam na, ya bãŋɛ a dãana lɔkra ẽ, tɩ yãnnɛ yõkɛ ẽ.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: La ya da dɩkɛ ẽ tɩ a lebge ya bɛ, kã'an ya ẽ wʋ ya sɔbia.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Zuudãana mẽŋa n de sũ-mã'asʋm dãana la wʋn bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm wakatɛ woo la sɛla woo pʋam. Zuudãana wʋn bɔna la ya wuu.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Mam Apolɩ n gʋlsɛ pʋ'ʋsgɔ wã la m mẽŋa nu'ugo, mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ ya. Mam gʋlsrɩ la wãna m gõnnɔ wuu pʋam, pa'ala tɩ la de la mam n gʋlsɛ.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya wuu.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Mam Apolɩ, la Asilvẽ, la Atimõtɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra yãma sɛba n de tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi nẽrba n boe Tesaloniki. Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Tõma pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ mɛ wakatɛ wuu a yel-sõnnɛ ya wuu ĩyã, dee tẽra ya yelle tɩ pʋ'ʋsgɔ pʋam ka gɔ'ɔra.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Tõma tẽrɩ ya yelle tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam, yãma n bɔ sɩra tõnna se'em, la yãma n tarɩ nõŋlʋm tõnna zozo'e se'em, dee ken tẽra yãma n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sɛla tɩ ya bɔ sɩra, zɛ kãŋkãŋɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam ka bigsra la yelle.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Tɩ sɔbiisi, tõma mi tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nõŋɛ ya mɛ looge ya tɩ ya dɛna a nẽrba.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: Tõma n daan tarɩ kõ-yẽlga la wa'am wa mõolɛ bɔ ya la, la ka de yetɔga mã'a, la de la Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa pãŋa. La tõma daan mi tɩ tõma n tɔgɛ se'em na de la sɩra. Yãma mi tõma n daan boe ya zẽ'am na, tõma n vɔa se'em yãma sõŋrɛ ĩyã.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: La yãma ɩtɩ la tõma, la tɩ Zuudãana n ɩtɩ se'em na, la baa yãma n to'oge kõ-yẽlga la yẽ nãmsgɔ zozo'e la, ya tarɩ ẽ mɛ la sũ-yẽlga n ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa zẽ'am.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Bɛla, yãma de la sɛba tɩ Masedʋanɩ, la Akayi so'olʋm nẽr-sɛba n bɔ Azezi sɩra la wʋn bɩsra, ɩta yãma n ẽŋɛ se'em na.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Zuudãana Azezi kõ-yẽlga la ze'ele la yãma zẽ'am saagɛ Masedʋanɩ, la Akayi, la, la dagɩ bilam mã'a, zẽ'esɩ wuu nẽrba wõm yãma n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra se'em mɛ, tɩ la põn ka le dɛna tɩ tɔgɛ.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Nẽrba la wuu tɔgrɩ pa'ala yãma n daan to'oge tõma sõŋa se'em, basɛ baga, dee dɔla Nawẽnnɛ tõnna bɔ'ɔra ẽŋa n de vɔm, la sɩra dãana.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: dee gu'ura a Dayʋa Azezi n wʋn ze'ele Nawẽnnɛ yire wa'am. La de la ẽŋa n daan ki, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ botɩ a vo'oge, ẽŋa n yetɩ a fãagɛ tɔ Nawẽnnɛ sũ-isgre n sẽm na pʋam.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Mam Apolɩ n de Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã. La de la Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra, la Azezi-krisi tɩ tɩ tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la, n bɔ mam nõorɛ tɩ mam dɛna a Tõntõnna.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Mam gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra la Atimõtɩ n lebge mam mẽŋa bia Azezi-krisi doosgo la pʋam. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ fʋ yel-sõnnɛ, dee zoe fʋ ninbãalga, dee bɔ fɔ sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: Mam n daan we'esɩ Masedʋanɩ dee yele fʋ se'em na, ken weege Efɛɛzɩ tẽŋa yele nẽr-sɛba n zãsnɩ põmpɔrŋɔ zãsŋɔ la tɩ ba da zãsʋm.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: Yele ba tɩ ba basɛ kʋrʋm kʋrʋm dõma sɔlma, la yaabdõma deto kãalgɔ n ka tarɩ ba'asgɔ. Bõn-bãma tarɩ la nõke'ene sẽna, dee ka sõŋra tɩ Nawẽnnɛ tõoma sẽnna nẽŋa. Nẽrba n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n botɩ a tõoma la sẽnna nẽŋa.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Mam yetɩ fʋ yele ba bɛla, tɩ ba tara la pʋtẽ'erɛ n ãn sõŋa, dee bãŋɛ ba sũure pʋam tɩ ba ka tarɩ dõrga, dee bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra la ba sũure wuu tɩ ba nõŋlʋm zo'oge.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: La nẽrba basɛba basɛ bõn-bãma mɛ, dee tɔgra yetɔg-yaalsɩ.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: bɔɔra tɩ ba dɛna Nawẽnnɛ lɔɔ karẽnsãandõma, dee ka wõnna ba mẽŋa n yetɩ se'em, bɩɩ yel-sɛba tɩ ba zãsnɩ na võorɛ.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: Tɩ mi tɩ Amoyisi lɔɔ ãn sõŋa, ba sãn dɩkɛ ẽ tõm wʋ lan masɛ se'em.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Tõma mi tɩ lɔɔ la ka ẽŋɛ sɛba n masɛ la ĩyã, a ẽŋɛ la nẽr-sɛba n ka sakrɩ lɔɔ, la sɛba n ka sakrɩ nõorɛ la ĩyã, la sɛba toogo n ka boe la Nawẽnnɛ, la tõon-be'ero dõma, la nẽr-sɛba n pɔ'ɔrɩ Nawẽnnɛ dee ka nanna bõn-sɛba wuu n de Nawẽnnɛ bõnɔ, la sɛba n kʋʋrɩ ba sɔdõma, la ba madõma, la sɛba n de nẽr-kʋʋrba ĩyã.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: la sɛba n ɩtɩ yalsɩ, la bʋra-sɛba n gã la taaba, la pɔg-sɛba n gã la taaba, la sɛba n yõgrɩ nẽrba kɔɔsra, la põmpɔrndõma, la sɛba n pɔtɩ dee ka ɩta ban yele se'em na, la nẽr-sɛba n ɩtɩ sɛla woo n sɩ'ɩsrɩ sɩra kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: Kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa ze'ele la sũ-yẽlga dãana Nawẽnnɛ n tarɩ na'am pãŋa la zẽ'am, ẽŋa n dɩkɛ ẽ ẽŋɛ mam nu'usum tɩ m mõolɛ.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: Mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi n bɔ mam pãŋa, la ẽn bãŋɛ tɩ mam de sɩra dãana looge mam tɩ m tõm a tõonɛ wã.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: Baa mam n daan pɔ'ɔrɩ a yʋ'ʋrɛ, nãmsra a nẽrba, dee tʋʋra ẽ na, a zoe mam ninbãalga mɛ. Se'ere n soe la, mam daan ka bãŋɛ mam ɩtɩ sɛla, mam n daan ka bɔ Azezi sɩra la ĩyã tɩ mam ɩta bɛla.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi la ẽŋɛ mam a yel-sõnnɛ mɛ zozo'e, botɩ mam bɔ ẽ sɩra, dee tara a nõŋlʋm.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: Yetɔg-sɛka tɩ mam yetɩ m tɔgɛ wã de la sɩra, la a masɛ mɛ tɩ nẽra woo to'oge ẽ sõŋa: «Azezi-krisi wa'am dũnia zuo wa fãagɛ la tõon-be'ero dõma.» La mam n de tõon-be'ero dãana gãnna ba wuu.

eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: La ẽn zoe mam ninbãalga la, la de la Azezi-krisi n pa'alɛ a sũ-mã'arɛ zozo'e la mam n de tõon-be'ero dãana gãnna la, tɩ la wʋn dɛna makrɛ pa'alɛ nẽr-sɛba n wʋn wa bɔ ẽ sɩra la, tɩ a wʋn ẽŋɛ a sũ-mã'asʋm la ba, dee bɔ ba vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n de naba wakatɛ wuu, n ka kiiri, tɩ nini ka yẽta ẽ, ẽŋa ayɩla mã'a sɔna pẽka la nã'asgɔ wakatɛ n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: M bia Atimõtɩ, mam zãsŋɔ n wãna tɩ mam dɩkɛ ɩta fʋ nu'usum, wʋ ban daan to'oge Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga tɔgɛ fʋ yelle se'em na: Basɛ tɩ yetɔg-bãma bɔ fʋ pãŋa, tɩ fʋ zɛbɛ zɛbrɛ sõŋa.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: ken bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra, dee ɩta sɛla tɩ fʋ mi fʋ sũure pʋam tɩ la ãn sõŋa. Nẽrba basɛba zagsɛ bɛla mɛ, tɩ bõn-ẽŋa basɛ tɩ ba ka le dɔla Azezi sore.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: Nẽr-bãma pʋam, Ahimẽnɩ, la Alɛgsãndrɩ n daan boe mĩ, tɩ mam daan basɛ ba la Asũtãana tɩ ba yõgɛ yɛm, da le pɔ'ɔra Nawẽnnɛ.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: Yetɔg-ẽna tɩ mam yetɩ m tɔgɛ wã de la sɩra, nẽra sãn bɔɔra tɩ a dɛna Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba nẽŋadãana, la de la tõon-sõŋɔ tɩ a boorɩ tɩ a tõm.

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: La dẽnɩ tɩ nẽŋadãana dɛna nẽra n ka tarɩ dõrga, la a dɛna pɔg-yẽŋa dãana, la a dɛna nẽra n tarɩ a mẽŋa sõŋa, dee tara pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, a dɛna nẽra tɩ ba nannɩ, la a dɛna nẽra n ɩtɩ nẽrba sãanɔ, dee tãna wʋn zãsʋm nẽrba.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: A da dɛna nẽra n dɩkɛ a mẽŋa bɔ dãam, a da dɛna zɛbzɛbra, a dɛna sũ-bʋgsʋm dãana, da nõŋɛ girgiri, la a da nõŋɛ bõnɔ.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: A dɛna nẽra n bɩsrɩ a yir-dõma yelle sõŋa, tɩ a kɔma sakra a yetɔga, nã'asra ẽ sɛla woo pʋam.

eng: because if they dont know how to manage their own household, how can they take care of Gods church?.
local: Nẽra sãn ka tãna bɩsra a mẽŋa yir-dõma yelle, a wʋn ẽŋɛ la wãne bɩsɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba yelle?.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: A da dɛna nẽr-paalga Azezi sore la pʋam, tɩ a da zẽkɛ a mẽŋa tɩ ba wa di a sarɩya wʋ Asũtãana la.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: La dẽnɩ tɩ nẽr-sɛba n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ mẽ tɔgra a yelle yetɩ a de la nẽr-sõŋɔ. Tɩ ba da wa pɔ'ɔgɛ ẽ, tɩ yãnnɛ yõkɛ ẽ tɩ a lui Asũtãana bẽrgɔ pʋam.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: Yel-bɩsrɩba mẽ masɛ mɛ tɩ ba dɛna nẽrba tɩ ba nannɩ, ba da dɛna nẽrba n tarɩ nõgõla, ba da yũura dãam bugra, ba da dɛna nẽrba n ɩtɩ sɛla n ka masɛ yẽta bõntarsõm.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Ba dɛna nẽrba n tarɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n daan sʋgɛ, tɩ a puke pa'alɛ tɩ la, ɩta sɛla woo tɩ ba mi ba sũure pʋam tɩ la masɛ mɛ.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: Dẽnɩ tɩ ba dẽŋɛ makɛ ba bɩsɛ, ba sãn ka tara dõrga, tɩ ba yãŋa tõm yel-bɩsrɩba tõoma la.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: La ba pɔgba mẽ masɛ tɩ ba dɛna la nẽrba tɩ ba nannɩ, ba da dɛna nẽrba n tɔgrɩ nẽrba be'em, ba tara ba mẽŋa sõŋa, dee dɛna sɩra dõma sɛla woo pʋam.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: Dẽnɩ tɩ yel-bɩsra dɛna pɔg-yẽŋa dãana, dee tãna bɩsra a kɔma, la a yir-dõma yelle sõŋa.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Yel-bɩsrɩba sɛba n tõnnɩ ba tõoma sõŋa yẽtɩ nã'asgɔ mɛ, la ba wʋn yẽ bʋraanɛ zozo'e Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam.

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: Mam tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ la kãn yuuge dee tɩ mam wa'am fʋ zẽ'am, la mam gʋlsɛ wãna bɔ'ɔra fɔ.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: tɩ mam sãn yuuge, fʋ tã'agɛ bãŋɛ nẽra n wʋn ãna se'em Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba tẽŋasʋka, nẽr-sɛba n de vɔm dãana Nawẽnnɛ mẽŋa nẽrba n tarɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra wʋ zẽerɛ n sõŋrɩ deego se'em na.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Tɩ wuu mi tɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n daan sʋgɛ tɩ a dɩkɛ pa'alɛ tɔ a doosgo pʋam na, de la bõn-kãtɛ. Bõn-kãtɛ ẽŋa de la: Krisi n daan lebge nẽrsaala. Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa pa'alɛ tɩ a de la sɩra dãana. Tɩ malɛkadõma bɩsɛ ẽ. Tɩ ba mõolɛ a yelle buuri wuu tẽŋasʋka. Tɩ nẽrba bɔ ẽ sɩra. Tɩ Nawẽnnɛ zẽkɛ ẽ la na'am pãŋa sẽŋɛ a yire.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa tɔgɛ mɛ vẽelga vẽelga yetɩ, dũnia ba'asgɔ wakatɛ, nẽrba basɛba wʋn basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo, dee dɔla sɛla n de pã'asgɔ, la kʋlkã'arsɩ põmpɔrŋɔ zãsŋɔ.

eng: They will be controlled by the pretense of lying, and their own consciences will be seared.
local: Ba de la põmpɔrndõma, la pʋlibsum dõma, tɩ ba zãsna põmpɔrŋɔ dee tɩ ba zuto ka zɛɛra.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Nẽr-bãma zãsnɩ nẽrba yetɩ, pɔgsɩ da ɛlla sɩrba, tɩ bʋraasɩ mẽ da dita pɔgba, la ba sisra dia basɛba da dita. La de la põmpɔrŋɔ, Nawẽnnɛ nãam bõn-bãma tɩ nẽr-sɛba n sakɛ ẽŋa mina sɩra la pʋ'ʋsra ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ dee dita ba.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Se'ere n soe la, sɛla woo tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nãam ãn sõŋa mɛ. Sɛla sɛla ka boe n de fʋ zagsɛ, fʋ sãn pʋ'ʋsɛ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga, la pʋ'ʋsgɔ n basrɩ tɩ sɛla woo ãna sõŋa Nawẽnnɛ zẽ'am.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: Pa'alɛ sɔbiisi la bɛla, tɩ fʋ wʋn dɛna Azezi-krisi tõntõn-sõŋɔ, n to'oge Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga tɩ fʋ bɔ sɩra la, tɩ a pa'asra fʋ pãŋa, dee dɔla zãsŋɔ n de sɩra la sõŋa.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la sɔlma n ka tarɩ võorɛ, dee keŋe fʋ mẽŋa dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sõŋa.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Nẽra n ɩtɩ se'em wɩsgra a ĩyã la tarɩ yõorɔ la fẽe, la a sãn dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sõŋa, la tarɩ yõorɔ mɛ sɛla woo pʋam, ẽŋa n sõŋrɩ tõma vɔm sɛka tɩ tɩ tarɩ lɛɛlɛ wã pʋam, dee wʋn bɔ tɔ vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: Yetɔg-ẽna de la sɩra, la a masɛ mɛ tɩ nẽra woo to'oge ẽ.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: Bɛla, tõma n tõnnɩ nãmsra mõrgra la, la de la tõma n tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura vɔm dãana Nawẽnnɛ n de nẽrsaalba wuu Fãagra la ĩyã, la a de la sɛba n bɔ ẽ sɩra la Fãagra gãnna.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Pa'alɛ ba, dee zãsʋm ba bõn-bãna.

eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Da basɛ tɩ nẽra zɛɛn fɔ, fõn de bõnbɩ'a la ĩyã, basɛ tɩ fʋ yetɔga, la fʋ yel-ɩrɛ, la fʋ nõŋlʋm, la fõn bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra se'em, la fʋ pʋpeelem ãna sõŋa, tɩ la pa'alɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba, bãma n wʋn vɔa se'em.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Mõrgɛ karẽŋra Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ pa'ala nẽrba, bɔ'ɔra ba bʋraanɛ, dee zãsna ba halɩ tɩ m wa wa'am.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Da basɛ bɔ'a la tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ fɔ, tɩ ba daan to'oge Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga tɔgɛ a yelle, tɩ kẽma la daan dɩkɛ nu'usi paglɛ fʋ zuo pʋ'ʋsɛ bɔ fʋ la.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: Tõm tõon-bãna sõŋa, dɩkɛ fʋ mẽŋa bɔ tõoma la, tɩ nẽrba wuu wʋn yẽ fõn sẽnnɩ nẽŋa se'em.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Guuse fʋ mẽŋa la fʋ vɔm, la fʋ zãsŋɔ la. Mõrgɛ ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ ɩta bɛla wuu. Fʋ sãn ɩta bɛla, tɩ fʋ wʋn fãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa, la sɛba n selsrɩ fʋ la.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: Mam yetɩ ya mɛ lan gãnnɩ wuu, tɩ ya sɔsra dee kã'ara Nawẽnnɛ, dee pʋ'ʋsra ẽ a yel-sõnnɛ nẽrba wuu ĩyã.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: Sɔsra-ya Nawẽnnɛ bɔ'ɔra na'adõma, la sɛba wuu n tarɩ ke'eŋo, tɩ tɩ tã'agɛ vɔa la laafɛ, tɩ dãaŋɔ da bɔna, tɩ tɩ tã'agɛ dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sore sõŋa, tɩ tɩ yel-ɩrɛ ãna sõŋa.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: Bõn-ẽna n ãn sõŋa bɔ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra dee ãna a sũure yẽlʋm.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: Ẽŋa n boorɩ tɩ nẽrba wuu yẽ fãarɛ, dee bãŋɛ sɛla n de sɩra.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Nawẽnnɛ ayɩla mã'a n boe, la nẽra ayɩla mã'a n mẽ boe nẽrba la Nawẽnnɛ tẽŋasʋka naara ba taaba, ẽŋa de la Azezi-krisi n lebge nẽrsaala la.

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: La de la ẽŋa n dɩkɛ a vɔm yɔ to'oge nẽrba wuu basɛ, bɛla de la kaseto n pa'alɛ tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ tɩ a fãagɛ nẽrba wuu, a pa'alɛ bɛla la wakat-sɛka tɩ a looge la.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: Bɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ daan looge mam tɩ m dɛna Azezi Tõntõnna dɩkɛ yel-ẽna wã mõolɛ, dee zãsʋm bu-zãŋsɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra tɩ ba bɔ ẽ sɩra. Mam tɔgrɩ la sɩra, mam ka parnɩ.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: Bɛla mam boorɩ tɩ zẽ'a woo bʋraasɩ pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ, ba zẽkɛ ba nu'usi la pʋpeelem pʋ'ʋsra Nawẽnnɛ, ba da tara sũ-isgre bɩɩ nõke'ene.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: Pɔgsɩ mẽ yɛɛra futo wʋ lan masɛ, tɩ la da dɛna pa'al-m-mẽŋa bɩɩ yãnnɛ. Ba da ɛɛra tɩ ba nẽnnõm dɛna zuto lʋa, bɩɩ sãlma lɔgrɔ, bɩɩ kug-sõma lɔgrɔ, la futo ligri n zo'oge yɛa.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: Ba basɛ tɩ ba yel-ɩrɛ ãna sõŋa wʋ pɔgsɩ n nannɩ Nawẽnnɛ n masɛ tɩ ba ɩta se'em.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: La masɛ tɩ zãsŋɔ wakatɛ pɔgsɩ ãna sĩm, dee sakra nõorɛ.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: Mam ka bɔ pɔgsɩ nõorɛ tɩ ba zãsna, bɩɩ ba sɔna bʋraasɩ, ba ãna sĩm.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: La de la Adam tɩ Nawẽnnɛ daan dẽŋɛ nãam, dee yãŋa nãam Awa.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: La, la dagɩ Adam tɩ Asũtãana daan pã'asɛ, a daan pã'asɛ la Awa yãŋɛ, tɩ a sɩ'ɩsɛ Nawẽnnɛ nõorɛ.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: La baa pɔgsɩ n nãmsrɩ dee dɔgra la, ba tã wʋn yẽ fãarɛ, ba sãn mõrgɛ ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ doosgo pʋam, tara nõŋlʋm la pʋpeelem, dee guusra ba mẽŋa.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Mam Apolɩ n de Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em, tɩ m mõolɛ vɔm sɛka tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bĩŋe nõorɛ tɩ a bɔ tɔ Azezi-krisi ĩyã la yelle.

eng: To Timothy, my dear child. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Mam gʋlsrɩ bɔ'ɔra la Atimõtɩ n lebge mam bi-nõŋrɛ la. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ fɔ yel-sõnnɛ, dee zoe fʋ ninbãalga, dee bɔ fɔ sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: Mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ a yel-sõnnɛ, mam tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra ẽ mina m sũure pʋam tɩ la ãn sõŋa, wʋ mam yaabdõma n yʋʋn tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra ẽ se'em na. Mam tẽrɩ fʋ yelle m pʋ'ʋsgɔ pʋam yʋ'ʋŋɔ la wʋntɛɛŋa ka basra.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: Mam tẽrɩ fõn daan kellɩ la mɛ, tɩ mam bɔɔra tɩ m le yẽ fɔ, tɩ m wʋn tara sũ-yẽlga zozo'e.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: Mam tẽrɩ fõn bɔ Azezi sɩra la fʋ sũure wuu, wʋ fʋ ma-keko Aloyiizi, la fʋ ma A'enisi n daan dẽŋɛ bɔ Azezi sɩra se'em na. Mam mi tɩ fʋ ken bɔ sɩra la bɛla.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: La de la bɛla tɩ mam tẽera fɔ tɩ fʋ dɩkɛ bɔ'a la tɩ mam daan dɩkɛ m nu'usi paglɛ fʋ zuo tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ fɔ la, malɩn tõm gãŋɛ bɛla.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Se'ere n soe la, Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ tɔ a Sɩa la ka botɩ tɩ tara dabeem, a botɩ tɩ tara la pãŋa, la nõŋlʋm, la yõk-m-mẽŋa.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Bɛla, da zoe yãnnɛ ka tɔgɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi yelle. La fʋ ken da zoe yãnnɛ mam n boe yʋ'a deem Azezi-krisi kõ-yẽlga ĩyã la, lagɩm na mam sakɛ nãmsgɔ kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ wʋn bɔ fʋ pãŋa.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: Ẽŋa n fãagɛ tɔ, wi to tɩ tɩ dɛna a nẽrba, la dagɩ tɩn tõm tõon-sõma ĩyã, la de la a mẽŋa n boorɩ se'em, la a yel-sõnnɛ tɩ a ẽŋɛ bɔ tɔ Azezi-krisi ĩyã, halɩ lan dẽŋɛ dũnia pĩ'iluŋo.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: Yel-sõnnɛ ẽŋa yãŋa puke la Azezi-krisi wa'aŋɔ la ĩyã. Ẽŋa n fãagɛ tɔ, sã'am kũm pãŋa dee botɩ tɩ yẽ vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ a kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: Nawẽnnɛ n looge mam tɩ m dɛna Krisi Tõntõnna mõola a kõ-yẽlga, dee zãsna nẽrba.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: La de la kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã tɩ mam yẽta nãmsgɔ, la mam ka zotɩ yãnnɛ, se'ere n soe la, mam mi sɛka tɩ mam bɔ sɩra la mɛ, la mam mi m sũure pʋam tɩ a tarɩ pãŋa mɛ wʋn gu'ura sɛla tɩ a dɩkɛ ẽŋɛ mam nu'usum na sõŋa, halɩ ka paagɛ Nawẽnnɛ sarɩyadia daarɛ.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Basɛ tɩ zãsŋɔ sɛka tɩ mam pa'alɛ fʋ la bɔna fʋ sũure pʋam tɩ fʋ bɩsra dɔla, ken bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra tara nõŋlʋm a doosgo pʋam.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Tara zãsŋɔ sõma sɛba tɩ Nawẽnnɛ dɩkɛ ẽŋɛ fʋ nu'usum na la Nawẽnnɛ Sɩa n boe la tɩ lɛ la pãŋa.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: Fõn põn mina tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽr-sɛba n boe Azi so'olʋm la wuu basɛ mam mɛ, Afizɛlɩ la Ahɛrmozɛnɩ boe la nẽr-bãma pʋam.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: Tɩ Zuudãana wʋn zoe A'onezifɔɔrɩ la a yir-dõma ninbãalga, se'ere n soe la, a ẽn bɔ'ɔra mam bʋraanɛ mɛ, dee ka zoe yãnnɛ la ban ba mam la bãnsɩ la.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: La ẽn wa'am Rom na, a mõ'ogɛ la nifo ɛ mam, halɩ wa yẽ mam.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: Sarɩyadia daarɛ, tɩ Zuudãana wʋn zoe a ninbãalga. La fõn ken mina sõŋa sõŋrɛ sɛka wuu tɩ a sõŋɛ mam Efɛɛzɩ.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: M bia, keŋe fʋ mẽŋa yel-sõnnɛ sɛka tɩ Azezi-krisi ẽŋɛ bɔ tɔ la pʋam.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: Mam n zãsʋm fʋ bõn-sɛba nẽrba zozo'e nẽŋam na, dɩkɛ ba zãsʋm nẽrba n de sɩra dõma n mẽ tã wʋn dɩkɛ ba zãsʋm nẽrba basɛba.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: Fõn de Azezi-krisi tõntõn-sõŋɔ la, fʋ mẽ sakɛ nãmsgɔ wʋ sʋda-sõŋɔ n sakrɩ nãmsgɔ se'em na.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: Sʋdaaga sãn bɔɔra tɩ a tõm tɩ a kɛ'ɛma sũure ẽŋɛ yẽlʋm, a ka kẽ'esrɩ a mẽŋa yel-sɛba n dagɩ sʋdaasɩ yɛla pʋam.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: La de'eŋo mẽ pʋam, nẽra ka tã wʋn zoe di to'oge bɔ'a tɩ a sãn ka doose zʋa la sɔa wuu.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: La de la kaara sɛka n tõm nãmsɛ n wʋn dẽŋɛ to'oge a bõnkɔɔla la yõorɔ.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Wõm mam n yele se'em na võorɛ, tɩ Zuudãana wʋn basɛ tɩ fʋ bãŋɛ sɛla woo võorɛ.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Tẽra Azezi-krisi n de naba Adavidi yɩɩŋa la yelle, a ki dee vo'oge, wʋ kõ-yẽlga la tɩ mam mõolɩ la n yetɩ se'em na.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: La de la kõ-yẽlga ẽŋa ĩyã tɩ mam nãmsra, halɩ tɩ ba ba mam na bãnsɩ, wʋ mam de la tõon-be'ero dãana la. La ba ka ba Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: Bɛla ĩyã tɩ mam mõrgɛ wĩbra sɛla woo pʋam Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la tɩ a looge la ĩyã, tɩ ba mẽ yẽ fãarɛ Azezi-krisi ĩyã, dee po yẽ nã'asgɔ n ka ba'asrɩ.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: Yetɔg-ẽna wã de la sɩra: Tɩ sãn ki la ẽ, tɩ wʋn lagɩm na ẽ vɔa.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: La tɩ sãn mõrgɛ ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ, tɩ wʋn lagɩm na ẽ di na'am. Tɩ sãn zagsɛ yetɩ tõma ka mi ẽ, a mẽ wʋn zagsɛ yetɩ ẽŋa ka mi to.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: Tɩ sãn ka bɔna tɩ sɩra pʋam, ẽŋa ken dɛna la sɩra dãana, se'ere n soe la, a ka malɩn viira a yetɔga.

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Tẽegɛ nẽrba la bõn-bãma, dee kã'an ba Nawẽnnɛ nẽŋam tɩ ba da wẽ'era nõkɛ'ɛma yetɔg-biɛ yɛla, tɩ ba ka tarɩ yõorɔ baa fẽfẽe, dee sã'ana sɛba n selsrɩ la.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Nargɛ pãŋa dɛna nẽra n paagɛ Nawẽnnɛ yɛm, la fʋ dɛna tõntõnna n ka zotɩ yãnnɛ la a tõoma, dee mõola sɩra kõ-yẽlga la lan masɛ se'em.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la yetɔg-yooro n ka sõŋrɩ Nawẽnnɛ doosgo pʋam, nẽr-sɛba n tɔgrɩ yetɔg-bãma la zãarɩ mɛ la Nawẽnnɛ wɛ'ɛsa be'em pʋam.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: Ba yetɔga la ãn wʋ nõr-kɛka n diti ĩyã yãara se'em na. Ahimẽnɩ la Afilɛtɩ boe la nẽr-bãma pʋam.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: Bãma bʋrgɛ mɛ basɛ sɩra sore la, yetɩ kũm vo'ore la põn tole mɛ, ba ẽŋɛ bɛla basɛ tɩ nẽr-sɛba n bɔ sɩra la basɛba n lɛbra poorʋm.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: La baa bɛla, Nawẽnnɛ n looge sɛba la ken zɛ la kãŋkãŋɛ wʋ ẽbrɛ n tarɩ pãŋa la. Yetɔg-bãna n de dãalgɔ n pa'alɛ bɛla: «Zuudãana la mi sɛba n de a nẽrba mɛ», la «sɛba wuu n yetɩ bãma de la Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la, dẽnɩ tɩ ba basɛ tõon-be'ero».

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: Yi-kãtɛ pʋam, dagɩ sãlma bɩɩ zũuro laasɩ mã'a n boe mĩ, dɔɔrɔ la yɔgrɔ laasɩ mẽ boe mĩ mɛ, tɩ ba dɩkɛ sãlma la zũuro laasɩ la tɩ ba dɛna tʋʋlʋm lɔgrɔ, dee dɩkɛ basɛba la tɩ ba dɛna daarɛ woo tõoma lɔgrɔ.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Bɛla mẽ, nẽra sãn zãagɛ a mẽŋa la tõon-be'ero sɛba tɩ mam pa'alɛ wã, a wʋn ãna wʋ tʋʋlʋm lɔkɔ n welge to'ore tara yõorɔ bɔ Zuudãana, dee tãna wʋn tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la yel-yooro sɛba tɩ kɔmbɩ'ɩsɩ boorɩ tɩ ba ɩta n de be'em na, dee ɛ sɛla n masɛ, ken bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra, ɛ nõŋlʋm, la sũ-mã'asʋm, dee lagɩm na nẽr-sɛba n pʋ'ʋsrɩ tɩ Zuudãana la pʋpeelem na.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la nõke'en-yaalsɩ n ka tarɩ võorɛ la. Fõn mi tɩ ba tarɩ la zɛbrɛ sẽnna.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: La Zuudãana tõntõnna ka masɛ tɩ a zɛbra. La masɛ mɛ tɩ a dɛna nẽra n nõŋɛ nẽrba, tãna wʋn zãsʋm nẽrba la sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: La masɛ tɩ a pa'ala nẽr-sɛba n ka sakrɩ la, la sũ-bʋgsʋm, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ tã wʋn basɛ tɩ ba teege yɛm mɛ bãŋɛ sɩra.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: le yẽ yɛm sõŋɔ yese Asũtãana bẽrgɔ la pʋam, tɩ a daan tarɩ ba tɩ ba ɩta ẽŋa n boorɩ se'em na.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Bʋra-yã'aŋa sãn ẽŋɛ sɛla, da tãsɛ ẽ, kã'an ẽ wʋ fʋ sɔ la. Kã'an kɔmbɩ'ɩsɩ wʋ fʋ sɔbiisi la.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: la fʋ kã'an pɔg-yã'asɩ wʋ fʋ madõma la, dee kã'an pug-sarsɩ wʋ fʋ tãpa la, la pʋpeelem.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: Nanna pɔkõpa sɛba n boe ba yɩla mã'a la, dee sõŋra ba.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: Pɔkõorɛ sãn tara kɔma bɩɩ yɩɩsɩ, bãma n masɛ tɩ ba bɩsra ba mẽŋa yir-dõma yelle, ba bɩsra ba dɔgrɩba la yelle wʋ ba dɔgrɩba la n daan bɩsrɩ ba yelle se'em na, bɛla n ãn Nawẽnnɛ sũure yẽlʋm.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Pɔkõ-sɛka n boe ayɩla mã'a ka tara nẽra nẽra la, a te'ege la Nawẽnnɛ pʋ'ʋsra sɔsra wʋntɛɛŋa la yʋ'ʋŋɔ.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: La pɔkõorɛ sɛka n eerɩ tõnna a yɛm n boorɩ se'em, ẽŋa põn ki mɛ baa la ẽn ken vɔa la.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Kã'an ba bɛla, tɩ nẽra da zɛrgɛ ba.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Nẽra sãn ka bɩsra a yir-dõma yelle, lan gãnnɩ a dee-dõma yelle, ẽŋa dãana zagsɛ sɛla tɩ tɩ bɔ sɩra la mɛ, la a de la tõon-be'ero dãana gãnna sɛka n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ na.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: Pɔkõ-sɛka tɩ ba tã wʋn gʋlsɛ a yʋ'ʋrɛ pa'asɛ pɔkõpa gõŋɔ pʋam de la pɔkõ-sɛka n paagɛ yʋʋma pisyoobɩ, dee ele sɩra ayɩla mã'a.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: La dẽnɩ tɩ nẽrba mina tɩ a de la tõon-sõma dãana, la a uge kɔma sõŋa, la a de la nẽra n ẽŋɛ nẽrba sãanɔ, la a peege Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba nãma, la a sõŋɛ nẽr-sɛba n nãmsɛ, dee dɛna nẽra n tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: La sãn dɛna pɔkõ-sɛba n ka kʋrgɛ la, da gʋlsɛ ba yʋ'ʋra pɔkõpa la pʋam, se'ere n soe la, ba yɛm sãn wa bɔna bʋraasɩ pʋam, ba wʋn basɛ Krisi tõoma mɛ, dee bɔɔra tɩ ba ele.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: La bɛla wʋn dɛna la tuure bɔ ba, ban sã'am ba nõorɛ la tɩ ba dẽŋɛ bĩŋe la ĩyã.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: Sɛla n pa'asɛ, ba sãn gʋlsɛ ba, ba wʋn lebge la zẽyãgsɩ ɛɛra kaara yiɛ, la, la dagɩ bɛla mã'a, ba wʋn lebge la yetɔg-tɔgsrɩba kẽ'era nẽrba yɛla pʋam, dee tɔgra yetɔg-sɛba n ka narɩ ba tɔgɛ.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: Bɛla, mam boorɩ tɩ pɔkõ-sɛba n ka kʋrgɛ la le ele dɔgɛ kɔma, bɩsra ba yir-dõma yelle, da basɛ tɩ bɛ'ɛba yẽ folle tɔgɛ tɩ be'em.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: Se'ere n soe la, pɔkõpa basɛba põn wẽrgɛ mɛ basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore dee dɔla Asũtãana.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Nẽra n bɔ Azezi sɩra sãn tara pɔkõpa a yire, a bɩsra ba yelle, a da dɩkɛ ba yelle basɛ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba zuo, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la tã'agɛ sõŋɛ pɔkõ-sɛba n ka tarɩ nẽra nẽra la.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: Wẽndeego nẽrba kẽma sãn bɩsrɩ nẽrba la yelle sõŋa, lan gãnnɩ wuu, sɛba n mõrgrɩ mõola dee zãsna Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la, ba wʋn yẽ la nã'asgɔ bʋyi.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: La gʋlsɛ Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ pʋam yetɩ: «Da ẽŋɛ lɔlga n tõnnɩ si pʋam nõorɛ yʋka», dee ken yetɩ: «La masɛ tɩ tõntõnna to'oge a yɔɔrɔ.».

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Nẽra sãn dõrɛ kẽma yetɩ a tõm na tõon-be'ero, da selse ẽ, sãn dagna nẽrba bayi bɩɩ batã n de kaset-dõma.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: La kẽma sãn tõm tõon-be'ero, fʋ kã'an ẽ Wẽndeego la pʋam nẽrba wuu nẽŋam, tɩ nẽrba basɛba la zoe dabeem.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: Mam yetɩ fʋ la Nawẽnnɛ, la Azezi-krisi, la malɛkadõma nẽŋam yetɩ, fʋ doose pa'algɔ bãna wã la sɩra, da bɔkra nẽrba.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Da kãblɛ dɩkɛ fʋ nu'usi paglɛ nẽra zuo tɩ a tõm Nawẽnnɛ tõoma, da naagɛ la nẽra a tõon-be'ero pʋam, dɛna pʋpeelem dãana.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: Da le yũura ko'om mã'a, yũura vẽ fẽe fʋ pʋʋr-dõoma, la fʋ ĩyã n ka tarɩ pãŋa la ĩyã.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Nẽrba basɛba tõon-be'ero puke mɛ lan dẽŋɛ ba wʋn di ba sarɩya. La nẽrba basɛba tõon-be'ero nãn ka puke, dee wʋn wa puke mɛ.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Bɛla mẽ, tõon-sõma basɛba puke mɛ, la sɛba n sʋgɛ la ka tã wʋn sʋgɛ ka puke.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Nẽr-sɛba n de yamsɩ la, dẽnɩ tɩ ba nanna ba zuudãandõma sõŋa, tɩ nẽra da pɔ'ɔgɛ Nawẽnnɛ yʋ'ʋrɛ, la tɩ zãsŋɔ la.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: La yam-sɛba zuudãandõma n bɔ Azezi sɩra la, la ka masɛ tɩ ba ka nanna ba yetɩ bãma de la sɔbiisi. La de la ba tõn malɩn tõnna bɔ'ɔra ba gãnna bɛla, se'ere n soe la, sɛba tɩ ya tõnnɩ bɔ'ɔra la, de la nẽrba n bɔ Azezi sɩra dee tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nõŋɛ ba. La de la bõn-bãna tɩ fʋ wʋn zãsʋm ba, dee kã'an ba tɩ ba ɩta.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Nẽra sãn zãsʋm zãsŋɔ ayẽma ka dɔla tõma Zuudãana Azezi-krisi sɩra yetɔga, bɩɩ ka dɔla zãsŋɔ sɛka n pa'alɩ tɩ wʋn ãna se'em Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo pʋam na.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: a tarɩ la pa'al-m-mẽŋa zo'oge dee ka mina sɛla sɛla, la a nõŋɛ la yetɔg-yaalsɩ la nõke'ene wẽ'a. Bõn-bãma n sẽm na ɩta sũure la tadãana bõnɔ, la a ka wõm taaba, la yʋ'ʋr-sã'aŋɔ, la tẽ'esɛ be'em bɔ'ɔra nẽrba.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: tɩ ba wẽ'era nõke'ene n ka ba'asrɩ la taaba, ban tarɩ yɛm be'ero dee ka tara yel-sɩra, dee tẽ'esra tɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo la de la sɛla n wʋn basɛ tɩ ba yẽ bõntarsõm na ĩyã.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: La de la sɩra tɩ nẽra n dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore sãn tara sũ-yẽlʋm la sɛla tɩ a tarɩ la, a yẽtɩ yõorɔ zozo'e mɛ.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it.
local: Tɩ ka tarɩ sɛla sɛla wa'am dũnia zuo, la tɩ mẽ kãn tã'agɛ tarɩ sɛla sɛla dũnia wã zuo fõrgɛ.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: Bɛla, tɩ sãn tara dia la futo, la seke mɛ.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
local: La sɛba n boorɩ tɩ ba yẽ bõntarsõm na kẽ'erɩ la yɛla pʋam, luta Asũtãana bẽrgɔ pʋam. Ba boorɩ la bõnɔ zozo'e n de yalnɛ la be'em, bõn-bãma n kẽ'esrɩ nẽrsaalba wõŋrɛ la sã'aŋɔ pʋam.

eng: The love of money is the root of all kinds of evil. Some have wandered away from the faith and have impaled themselves with a lot of pain because they made money their goal.
local: Se'ere n soe la, ligri nõŋlʋm de la tõon-be'ero wuu yẽgrɛ. Nẽrba basɛba nõŋɛ la ligri bʋrgɛ dee basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore, nãmsɛ ba mẽŋa la toogo buuri zozo'e.

eng: But as for you, man of God, run away from all these things. Instead, pursue righteousness, holy living, faithfulness, love, endurance, and gentleness.
local: La fõn de Nawẽnnɛ nẽra la, zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la bõn-bãma, dee ɛ sɛla n masɛ, la Nawẽnnɛ sakrɛ, ken bɔ ẽ sɩra, ɛ nõŋlʋm, la sũ-mã'arɛ, la sũ-bʋgsʋm.

eng: Compete in the good fight of faith. Grab hold of eternal life—you were called to it, and you made a good confession of it in the presence of many witnesses.
local: Mõrgɛ mẽ mẽerɛ sõŋa Nawẽnnɛ sore doosgo la pʋam yẽ vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ, tɩ la de la bɛla ĩyã tɩ Nawẽnnɛ looge fo, tɩ fʋ daan tɔgɛ yetɔg-sõŋɔ yetɩ fõn bɔ Azezi sɩra nẽrba zozo'e nẽŋam na.

eng: I command you in the presence of God, who gives life to all things, and Christ Jesus, who made the good confession when testifying before Pontius Pilate.
local: Mam yetɩ fo Nawẽnnɛ n bɔ'ɔrɩ sɛla woo vɔm nẽŋam, la Azezi-krisi n daan tɔgɛ sɩra kaseto Apõnsɩ-pilatɩ nẽŋam na.

eng: Obey this order without fault or failure until the appearance of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: yetɩ fʋ sakɛ pa'algɔ tɩ fʋ to'oge la, gʋrɛ ba sõŋa la pʋpeelem, tɩ dõrga kana, halɩ ka paagɛ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi lemŋo.

eng: The timing of this appearance is revealed by God alone, who is the blessed and only master, the King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: Nawẽnnɛ wʋn botɩ a leme wa'am na wakat-sɛka tɩ a looge la. Sũ-yẽlga dãana Nawẽnnɛ ayɩla mã'a n de na-kãtɛ, a de la na'adõma Naba, la zuudãandõma Zuudãana.

eng: He alone has immortality and lives in light that no one can come near. No human being has ever seen or is able to see him. Honor and eternal power belong to him. Amen.
local: Ẽŋa mã'a n vɔa wakatɛ wuu, a boe la peelem n nẽegɛ gãŋɛ pʋam tɩ nẽra ka tãna wʋn paagɛ mĩ, nẽra baa ayɩla ken ka yẽ ẽ, la nẽra nãn ka yẽtɩ ẽ. Ẽŋa n soe nã'asgɔ, la pãŋa n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina.

eng: Tell people who are rich at this time not to become egotistical and not to place their hope on their finances, which are uncertain. Instead, they need to hope in God, who richly provides everything for our enjoyment.
local: Kã'an nẽr-sɛba n tarɩ dũnia wã bõntarsõm na yetɩ, ba da zẽkra ba mẽŋa, la ba da dɩkɛ ba te'ere te'ege bõntarsõm tɩ ba ka mĩ ban wʋn ãna se'em, ba te'ege Nawẽnnɛ, tɩ ẽŋa n bɔ'ɔrɩ tɔ sɛla woo tɩ la sɛkra sõŋa sõŋa tɩ tɩ ɩta sũ-yẽlga.

eng: Tell them to do good, to be rich in the good things they do, to be generous, and to share with others.
local: Kã'an ba yetɩ, ba ɩta sõŋa, ba dɛna nẽrba n tõnnɩ tõon-sõma zozo'e, la ba dɛna nẽrba n bɔ'ɔrɩ, dee pʋta sɛla tɩ ba tarɩ bɔ'ɔra nẽrba la sũ-yẽlga.

eng: When they do these things, they will save a treasure for themselves that is a good foundation for the future. That way they can take hold of what is truly life.
local: Bɛla tɩ ba wʋn lagsɛ bõntarsõm n ãn sõŋa kãn sã'am wakatɛ n sẽm na ĩyã, tɩ ba wʋn yẽ vɔm mẽŋa mẽŋa.

eng: Timothy, protect what has been given to you in trust. Avoid godless and pointless discussions and the contradictory claims of so-called knowledge.
local: Fõn Atimõtɩ, bɩsra sɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ dɩkɛ gu'ule fo la, mõrgɛ zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la yetɔg-yooro n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore, zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la nõke'ene wẽ'a tɩ nẽrba tẽ'esrɩ tɩ la de la bãŋrɛ dee tɩ la dagna bɛla la.

eng: When some people adopted this false knowledge, they missed the goal of faith. May grace be with you all.
local: La nẽrba basɛba tarɩ la bõn-bãma tẽ'esɛ tɩ bãma tarɩ la bãŋrɛ, bʋrgɛ dee basɛ Nawẽnnɛ sore. Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya a yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: Bãŋɛ tɩ dũnia ba'asgɔ wakatɛ, la wʋn dɛna la toogo.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Nẽrba wʋn dɛna la nõŋ-m-mẽŋa dõma, la lig-nõŋrɩba, ba wʋn dɛna la nẽrba n wẽ'erɩ ba yõ'orɔ, la pa'al-m-mẽŋa dõma, la nẽrba n tɔgrɩ sɛla n ka ãn sõŋa, la nẽrba n ka sakrɩ ba sɔdõma la ba madõma nõorɛ, la nẽrba n ka mi yel-sõnnɛ tɩ ba ẽŋɛ ba, la nẽrba toogo n ka boe la bõn-sɛba n de Nawẽnnɛ bõnɔ.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: la nẽrba n ka nõŋɛ taaba, la nẽrba n ka tarɩ nẽra zĩile, la gõngõ'osrɩba, la nẽrba n ka tarɩ ba mẽŋa sõŋa, la nẽr-tɔɔsɩ, la nẽrba n sisri sɛla n ãn sõŋa.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: la zãm dõma, la nẽrba n ka yõkrɩ ba mẽŋa ɩta sɛla n ka masɛ tɔtɔ, la uk-m-mẽŋa dõma, la nẽrba n nõŋɛ sɛla n ɩtɩ bãma mẽŋa sũure yẽlʋm gãnna Nawẽnnɛ.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: Ba ɩtɩ tɩ la ãna wʋ ba sakrɩ la Nawẽnnɛ, la ba ka sakrɩ a pãŋa la. Zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la nẽr-bãma buuri.

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: Ba nẽrba basɛba kẽ'erɩ la yiɛ pʋam pã'asra pɔg-sɛba yɛm n ka boe zẽ'a ayɩla la. Pɔg-bãma tõm na tõon-be'ero tɩ la dɛna zeero bɔ ba, ban boorɩ se'em na n tarɩ ba yɛ'ɛna.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: tɩ ba zãsna wakatɛ wuu dee ka tãna wʋn bãŋɛ sɛla n de sɩra la.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: Nẽr-bãma ka sakrɩ sɩra, wʋ Azanɛsɩ la Azãmbrɛsɩ n yʋʋn ka sakɛ bɔ Amoyisi se'em na. Ba de la nẽrba yɛm n bʋrʋm, tɩ ba Nawẽnnɛ doosgo la lebge zãŋa.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: La ba kãn sẽŋɛ nẽŋa, se'ere n soe la, nẽrba wuu wʋn yẽ ba yalnɛ na mɛ, wʋ ban yʋʋn yẽ Azanɛsɩ la Azãmbrɛsɩ yelle se'em na.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: La fõn mi bõn-sɛba tɩ mam zãsʋm nẽrba mɛ, fʋ mi mam yel-ɩrɛ, la mam yɛm loore n ãn se'em mɛ, la fʋ mi mam n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra se'em, la mam sũ-mã'arɛ, la mam nõŋlʋm, la mam n ze'ele kãŋkãŋɛ se'em.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: fʋ mi nẽrba n nãmsɛ mam se'em, la toog-sɛba wuu n paagɛ mam Antɩyɔsɩ, la Ikonim, la Listri tẽnsɩ pʋam Azezi ĩyã. Bẽm nãmsgɔ tɩ mam ka yẽ? La Zuudãana la fãagɛ mam bɛla wuu pʋam mɛ.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: La de la bɛla, nẽr-sɛba wuu n boorɩ tɩ ba vɔa wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n boorɩ se'em Azezi-krisi doosgo pʋam, ba wʋn nãmsɛ ba mɛ.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: La tõon-be'ero dõma, la sɛba n pã'asrɩ nẽrba wʋn ken kẽ'era la tõon-be'ero pʋam pa'asra wɛ'ɛsa, ba pã'asrɩ la nẽrba, dee pã'asra ba mẽŋa.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: La sãn dɛna fõn, tara bõn-sɛba tɩ fʋ zãsʋm dee sakɛ tɩ la de la sɩra la kãŋkãŋɛ, fʋ mi nẽr-sɛba zẽ'am tɩ fõn zãsʋm bõn-bãma.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Fõn põn mina Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ la mɛ halɩ fʋ bõnbɩ'ɩlʋm, ẽŋa n tã wʋn bɔ fɔ yɛm, tɩ fʋ yẽ fãarɛ fõn bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra la ĩyã.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: Nawẽnnɛ gõŋɔ la wuu de la Nawẽnnɛ n botɩ ba gʋlsɛ, a yõorɔ de la a zãsʋm nẽrba sɩra, la a botɩ nẽrba bãŋɛ ba koŋre, la a kã'an nẽrba, la a pa'alɛ nẽrba tɩ ba ɩta sɛla n masɛ ãna sõŋa.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: bɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽra wʋn masɛ, mãasʋm tã'agɛ tõm tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

eng: Im giving you this commission in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who is coming to judge the living and the dead, and by his appearance and his kingdom.
local: Mam bɔ'ɔrɩ fʋ nõorɛ Nawẽnnɛ, la Azezi-krisi n wʋn wa'am wa di nẽr-vɔɔsɩ, la nẽr-sɛba n ki sarɩya la nẽŋam, la ẽn wʋn wa di a na'am na ĩyã.

eng: Preach the word. Be ready to do it whether it is convenient or inconvenient. Correct, confront, and encourage with patience and instruction.
local: tɩ fʋ mõolɛ Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la. Nẽrba sãn sɛlsra, bɩɩ ba sãn ka sɛlsra, mõolɛ le malɩn mõolɛ wakatɛ wuu. Tɔgɛ pa'alɛ ba tɩ ba bãŋɛ ba koŋre, gi ba, dee bɔ ba bʋraanɛ tɩ ba ɩta sõŋa, ɩta bɛla wuu la sũ-mã'asʋm dee tara zãsŋɔ pʋtẽ'erɛ.

eng: There will come a time when people will not tolerate sound teaching. They will collect teachers who say what they want to hear because they are self-centered.
local: Se'ere n soe la, wakatɛ n sẽm tɩ nẽrba kãn le bɔɔra tɩ ba selse sɩra zãsŋɔ la, ba wʋn dɔla la ba mẽŋa yɛm n boorɩ se'em, bɛla ba wʋn ɛɛra la karẽnsãandõma zozo'e n wʋn zãsʋm ba sɛla tɩ ba nõŋɛ tɩ ba selse mã'a.

eng: They will turn their back on the truth and turn to myths.
local: Ba wʋn lɩ ba tʋba mɛ kãn sɛlsra sɩra la, dee wẽrgɛ sɛlsra sɛla n de sɔlma.

eng: But you must keep control of yourself in all circumstances. Endure suffering, do the work of a preacher of the good news, and carry out your service fully.
local: La fõn, tara fʋ mẽŋa sõŋa sɛla woo pʋam, sakɛ nãmsgɔ, mõolɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la, la fʋ tõm tõonɛ na tɩ Nawẽnnɛ dɩkɛ ẽŋɛ fʋ nu'usum na sõŋa.

eng: Im already being poured out like a sacrifice to God, and the time of my death is near.
local: La sãn dɛna mam, mam vɔm ãn wʋ ko'om tɩ ba ka'agɛ bɔ Nawẽnnɛ, mam daarɛ paagɛ mɛ, tɩ mam wʋn fõrgɛ.

eng: I have fought the good fight, finished the race, and kept the faith.
local: Mam mẽ mẽerɛ sõŋa mɛ yãŋɛ, mam zoe paagɛ zʋa la tɛka mɛ, la mam bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra mɛ ka basɛ.

eng: At last the champions wreath that is awarded for righteousness is waiting for me. The Lord, who is the righteous judge, is going to give it to me on that day. Hes giving it not only to me but also to all those who have set their heart on waiting for his appearance.
local: Lɛɛlɛ wã, tã'arɛ yɔɔrɔ gã mɛ gu'ura mam, tɩ Zuudãana n diti sarɩya wʋ lan masɛ la, wʋn dɩkɛ bɔ mam daarɛ ẽŋa daarɛ. La, la dagɩ mam mã'a, la de la nẽr-sɛba wuu n nõŋɛ ẽ bɔɔra tɩ a leme wa'am na.

eng: Do your best to come to me quickly.
local: Mõrgɛ wa'am mam zẽ'am tɔtɔ.

eng: Demas has fallen in love with the present world and has deserted me and has gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
local: Se'ere n soe la, Ademasɩ basɛ mam mɛ dee sẽŋɛ Tesaloniki, ẽn nõŋɛ dũnia wã bõn-yooro la ĩyã. La Akresãnsɩ sẽŋɛ la Galatɩ, tɩ Atiti mẽ sẽŋɛ Dalmatɩ.

eng: Only Luke is with me. Get Mark, and bring him with you. He has been a big help to me in the ministry.
local: Aluki mã'a n weege mam zẽ'am. Fʋ sãn sẽna, fʋ tarɩ Amarkɩ wa'am, tɩ a tarɩ sõŋrɛ mɛ bɔ mam tõonɛ na ĩyã.

eng: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
local: Mam tõm Atisiki la Efɛɛzɩ.

eng: When you come, bring along the coat I left with Carpus in Troas. Also bring the scrolls and especially the parchments.
local: Fʋ sãn sẽna, fʋ dɩkɛ m ɔɔrɔ fuugo la tɩ mam daan basɛ Trʋasɩ Akarpusi zẽ'am na tarɩ wa'am, la fʋ dɩkɛ gõnnɔ na pa'asɛ, lan gãnnɩ wuu gõn-sɛba tɩ ba gʋlsɛ la dũnsi gãna kilim na.

eng: Alexander, the craftsman who works with metal, has really hurt me. The Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
local: Alɛgsãndrɩ n de kuta la ẽŋɛ mam na be'em halɩ zozo'e, Nawẽnnɛ wʋn yɔ ẽ ẽn ẽŋɛ se'em na.

eng: But watch out for him, because he opposes our teaching.
local: Fʋ mẽ guuse fʋ mẽŋa la ẽ, tɩ a sɩ'ɩsɛ tõma yetɔga la mɛ zozo'e.

eng: No one took my side at my first court hearing. Everyone deserted me. I hope that God doesnt hold it against them!.
local: Mam n daan ze'ele sarɩyadia zẽ'am pɔspɔsɩ la, nẽra nẽra ka ze'ele mam poorʋm sõŋɛ mam, ba wuu basɛ mam mɛ. Nawẽnnɛ da geele ban ẽŋɛ se'em na.

eng: But the Lord stood by me and gave me strength, so that the entire message would be preached through me and so all the nations could hear it. I was also rescued from the lions mouth!.
local: La Zuudãana la daan ze'ele mam poorʋm mɛ sõŋɛ mam, bɔ mam pãŋa halɩ tɩ mam mõolɛ kõ-yẽlga la sõŋa sõŋa, tɩ bu-zãŋsɩ zozo'e wõm. La mam daan yẽ fãarɛ mɛ gɩgnɛ nõorʋm.

eng: The Lord will rescue me from every evil action and will save me for his heavenly kingdom. To him be the glory forever and always. Amen.
local: Zuudãana la n wʋn ken fãagɛ mam yese mam be'em wuu pʋam, kẽ'esɛ mam a so'olʋm na pʋam. Ẽŋa n soe nã'asgɔ wakatɛ n ka ba'asrɩ. Amina.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila and the household of Onesiphorus.
local: Pʋ'ʋsɛ Aprisili, la Akila, la A'onezifɔɔrɩ yir-dõma.

eng: Erastus stayed in Corinth, and I left Trophimus in Miletus because of his illness.
local: A'erastɩ weege la Korẽntɩ. La Atrofim bẽ'erɩ mɛ, tɩ mam basɛ ẽ Milɛtɩ.

eng: Try hard to come to me before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers and sisters say hello.
local: Mõrgɛ wa'am dee tɩ ɔɔrɔ wakatɛ paagɛ. A'ebulusi la Apudẽnsɩ, la Alinusi, la Aklodia, la tɩ sɔbiisi la wuu pʋ'ʋsrɩ fɔ.

eng: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you all.
local: Tɩ Zuudãana wʋn bɔna la fɔ. Nawẽnnɛ wʋn ẽŋɛ ya a yel-sõnnɛ.

eng: From Paul, a slave of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. Im sent to bring about the faith of Gods chosen people and a knowledge of the truth that agrees with godliness.
local: Mam Apolɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã, mam de la Nawẽnnɛ yamŋa, la Azezi-krisi Tõntõnna tɩ a tõm tɩ m mõolɛ a kõ-yẽlga tɩ sɛba tɩ Nawẽnnɛ looge la bɔ sɩra, dee bãŋɛ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra n pa'alɩ ban wʋn dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sore se'em.

eng: Their faith and this knowledge are based on the hope of eternal life that God, who doesnt lie, promised before time began.
local: Tɩ tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ tɩ tɩ wʋn yẽ la vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n dagɩ põmpɔrma la daan bĩŋe nõorɛ halɩ tɩ dũnia nãn ka nãam.

eng: God revealed his message at the appropriate time through preaching, and I was trusted with preaching this message by the command of God our savior.
local: La wakatɛ n paagɛ la, a puke bõn-ẽŋa mɛ pa'alɛ a yetɔga pʋam, a dɩkɛ a yetɔga la ẽŋɛ la mam nu'usum tɩ m mõolɛ bɔ nẽrba, wʋ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra n bɔ nõorɛ se'em na.

eng: To Titus, my true child in a common faith. Grace and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our savior.
local: Mam n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra Atiti n lebge mam mẽŋa bia, tõma n lagɩm dɔla Azezi-krisi la ĩyã. Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Fãagra Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ fɔ a yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ fɔ a sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: The reason I left you behind in Crete was to organize whatever needs to be done and to appoint elders in each city, as I told you.
local: Mam n daan botɩ fʋ weege Krɛtɩ la, la de la fʋ malgɛ bõn-sɛba n deege dɛna ba malgɛ ba'asɛ la, la fʋ looge kẽma tẽŋa woo Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba pʋam wʋ mam n yele fʋ se'em na.

eng: Elders should be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, and have faithful children who cant be accused of self-indulgence or rebelliousness.
local: Kẽema masɛ tɩ a dɛna la nẽra n ka tarɩ dõrga, la a dɛna pɔg-yẽŋa dãana, tɩ a kɔma bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra, ka ɩta yooryooro, dee nanna nẽrba.

eng: This is because supervisors should be without fault as Gods managers: they shouldnt be stubborn, irritable, addicted to alcohol, a bully, or greedy.
local: Dẽnɩ tɩ nẽŋadãana n bɩsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba yelle dɛna nẽra n ka tarɩ dõrga, la a da dɛna pa'al-m-mẽŋa dãana, bɩɩ sũ-isgre dãana, a da dɛna dã-yũura, bɩɩ zɛbzɛbra, bɩɩ nẽra n ɩtɩ sɛla n ka masɛ yẽta bõntarsõm.

eng: Instead, they should show hospitality, love what is good, and be reasonable, ethical, godly, and self-controlled.
local: La masɛ mɛ tɩ a ɩta sãama sãanɔ, la a dɛna nẽra n nõŋɛ sɛla n ãn sõŋa ɩrgɔ, la a tara pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, la a dɛna nẽra n masɛ sɛla woo pʋam, la a dɛna pʋpeelem dãana, la a tãna a mẽŋa yõkra.

eng: They must pay attention to the reliable message as it has been taught to them so that they can encourage people with healthy instruction and refute those who speak against it.
local: La masɛ tɩ a tara sɩra zãsŋɔ la kãŋkãŋɛ, wʋ ban zãsʋm ẽ se'em na, tɩ a wʋn tã'agɛ bɔ nẽrba bʋraanɛ tɩ ba dɔla sɩra zãsŋɔ la, dee tã'agɛ pa'alɛ sɩ'ɩsrɩba tɩ ba bãŋɛ ba koŋre.

eng: In fact, there are many who are rebellious people, loudmouths, and deceivers, especially some of those who are Jewish believers.
local: Se'ere n soe la, nẽrba zozo'e n boe dɛna sɩ'ɩsrɩba, la yetɔg-yooro dõma, dee pã'asra nẽrba. Lan gãnnɩ wuu, nẽr-bãma boe la Zifdõma n wãtɩ la pʋam.

eng: They must be silenced because they upset entire households. They teach what they shouldnt to make money dishonestly.
local: La masɛ tɩ fʋ gu ba tɩ ba da tɔgra bɛla, tɩ ba zãsnɩ nẽrba la sɛla n ka masɛ, wã'ara nẽrba basɛba yiɛ, ba zãsnɩ sɛla n ka masɛ ɛɛra la bõntarsõm.

eng: Someone who is one of their own prophets said, People from Crete are always liars, wild animals, and lazy gluttons.
local: Krɛtɩ dõma mẽŋa bãŋra ayɩla yʋʋn yetɩ: «Krɛtɩ dõma de la põmpɔrndõma wakatɛ wuu, la pʋtʋʋl-dõma ãna wʋ we-dũnsi la, ba de la zẽyãgsɩ dee tara pʋyã'anɛ.».

eng: This statement is true. Because of this, correct them firmly, so that they can be healthy in their faith.
local: Yel-ẽŋa de la sɩra, bɛla ĩyã, kã'an ba sõŋa sõŋa tɩ ba dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sɩra la sõŋa.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to Jewish myths and commands from people who reject the truth.
local: Yele ba tɩ ba basɛ Zifdõma sɔlma, la bõn-sɛba tɩ nẽrba zagsɛ sɩra dee bɔ nõorɛ tɩ ba ɩta la.

eng: Everything is clean to those who are clean, but nothing is clean to those who are corrupt and without faith. Instead, their mind and conscience are corrupted.
local: Sɛla woo ãn sõŋa mɛ bɔ nẽr-sɛka n de pʋpeelem dãana, la sɛka n de tõon-dẽgrɔ dãana ka sakra Nawẽnnɛ, sɛla sɛla ka boe n ãn sõŋa bɔ ẽ. Ẽŋa pʋtẽ'erɛ, la a yɛm wuu ki mɛ.

eng: They claim to know God, but they deny God by the things that they do. They are detestable, disobedient, and disqualified to do anything good.
local: Ba yetɩ bãma mi Nawẽnnɛ mɛ, la ba tõoma la pa'alɩ tɩ ba sɩ'ɩsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ mɛ. Ba de la nẽr-bɛ'ɛsɩ gãŋɛ, la ba ka sakrɩ Nawẽnnɛ nõorɛ, dee ka tãna wʋn tõm tõon-sõŋɔ.

eng: But you should talk in a way that is consistent with sound teaching.
local: La fõn, zãsʋm nẽrba la bõn-sɛba n masɛ la sɩra zãsŋɔ la.

eng: Tell the older men to be sober, dignified, sensible, and healthy in respect to their faith, love, and patience.
local: Zãsʋm bʋra-yã'asɩ tɩ ba tara ba mẽŋa sõŋa, ba dɛna nẽrba tɩ ba nannɩ, ba tara pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, la ba dɛna nẽrba n dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra la sõŋa, ba tara nõŋlʋm, dee dɛna nẽrba n mã'agɛ ba sũure sẽnna nẽŋa.

eng: Likewise, tell the older women to be reverent in their behavior, teaching what is good, rather than being gossips or addicted to heavy drinking.
local: Yele pɔg-yã'asɩ tɩ ba yel-ɩrɛ pʋam ba dɛna pʋpeelem dõma, la ba da dɛna gõngõ'osrɩba, ba da dɛna nẽrba n dɩkɛ ba mẽŋa bɔ dãam. Ba pa'ala sɛla n ãn sõŋa.

eng: That way they can mentor young women to love their husbands and children.
local: ba pa'ala pɔg-bɩ'ɩsɩ tɩ ba nõŋɛ ba sɩrba, la ba kɔma.

eng: and to be sensible, morally pure, working at home, kind and submissive to their own husbands, so that Gods word wont be ridiculed.
local: tɩ ba tara pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, tɩ ba da ɩta dẽgrɔ, tɩ ba dɛna pɔg-mẽnsɩ, la pɔg-sõma, tɩ ba sakra ba sɩrba, tɩ nẽrba da pɔ'ɔgɛ Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la.

eng: Likewise, encourage the younger men to be sensible.
local: Kã'an kɔmbɩ'ɩsɩ la mẽ tɩ ba tara ba mẽŋa sõŋa sɛla woo pʋam.

eng: in every way. Offer yourself as a role model of good actions. Show integrity, seriousness.
local: Fõn mẽŋa botɩ fʋ yel-ɩrɛ wuu ãna sõŋa, pa'alɛ ba ban wʋn ãna se'em, la fʋ zãsʋm nẽrba Nawẽnnɛ yetɔga la sɩra, la ninmõ'orɛ.

eng: and a sound message that is above criticism when you teach, so that any opponent will be ashamed because they wont find anything bad to say about us.
local: La fʋ tɔgra sɩra tɩ ba da tã'agɛ zɛrgɛ fɔ, tɩ yãnnɛ wʋn yõkɛ sɛba n sɩ'ɩsrɩ la, ban kãn yẽ sɛla n de be'em tɩ zẽ'am tɔgɛ la ĩyã.

eng: Tell slaves to submit to their own masters and please them in everything they do. They shouldnt talk back.
local: Yele yamsɩ tɩ ba sakra ba zuudãandõma sɛla woo pʋam, ɩta ba sũure yẽlʋm, ba da zagsɛ ba nõorɛ.

eng: or steal. Instead, they should show that they are completely reliable in everything so that they might make the teaching about God our savior attractive in every way.
local: la ba da zũura ba lɔgrɔ. Ba tõnna tõon-sõma pa'alɛ tɩ bãma de la sɩra dõma, bɛla tɩ Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra zãsŋɔ la wʋn yẽta pẽka sɛla woo pʋam.

eng: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people.
local: Bẽm ĩyã, Nawẽnnɛ botɩ tɩ bãŋɛ a yel-sõnnɛ la n de fãarɛ bɔ nẽrsaalba wuu la mɛ.

eng: It educates us so that we can live sensible, ethical, and godly lives right now by rejecting ungodly lives and the desires of this world.
local: A zãsnɩ tõma tɩ tɩ basɛ la sɛla n ka dolɩ Nawẽnnɛ sore, la dũnia nẽrba n boorɩ sɛla la, dee vɔa dũnia wã zuo la pʋtẽ'e-sõŋɔ, la sɩra, dee dɔla Nawẽnnɛ sore sõŋa.

eng: At the same time we wait for the blessed hope and the glorious appearance of our great God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Bɛla tɩ tɩ wʋn tara pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura sũ-yẽlga daarɛ la, daar-ẽŋa Azezi-krisi n wʋn leme wa'am la a na'am pãŋa. Ẽŋa n de tõma Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Fãagra.

eng: He gave himself for us in order to rescue us from every kind of lawless behavior, and cleanse a special people for himself who are eager to do good actions.
local: Ẽŋa n dɩkɛ a vɔm bɔ tõma ĩyã, tɩ a fãagɛ tɔ tõon-be'ero wuu pʋam, dee basɛ tɩ tɩ malgɛ ãna sõŋa dɛna a mẽŋa nẽrba, mõrgɛ tõnna tõon-sõma.

eng: Talk about these things. Encourage and correct with complete authority. Dont let anyone disrespect you.
local: La de la bɛla tɩ fʋ wʋn zãsʋm ba, bɔ ba bʋraanɛ, dee kã'an ba. Ẽŋɛ bɛla la nõorɛ sɛka tɩ fʋ tarɩ la. Da basɛ tɩ nẽra pɔ'ɔgɛ fɔ.

eng: Remind them to submit to rulers and authorities. They should be obedient and ready to do every good thing.
local: Tẽegɛ ba wuu yetɩ la masɛ mɛ tɩ ba nanna tẽŋa la nẽŋadõma, la kɛ'ɛndõma dee sakra ba nõorɛ, dee tõnna tõon-sõma buuri wuu.

eng: They shouldnt speak disrespectfully about anyone, but they should be peaceful, kind, and show complete courtesy toward everyone.
local: Ba da tɔgra nẽrba be'em, ba da dɛna zɛbzɛbrɩba, la ba dɛna nẽrba n tarɩ sũ-mã'asʋm, dee ɩta sũ-bʋgsʋm la nẽrba wuu.

eng: We were once foolish, disobedient, deceived, and slaves to our desires and various pleasures too. We were spending our lives in evil behavior and jealousy. We were disgusting, and we hated other people.
local: Tõma mẽ daan de la nẽrba n ka mi sɛla, la sɩ'ɩsrɩba, la nẽrba n bʋrgɛ ka dɔla sɩra sore, tɩ tõma yɛmleego, la bõn-yooro tɩ tõma boorɩ la sɔna tõma. Tõma daan vɔa la pʋtʋʋlgɔ pʋam, ɩta sũure la tɩ taaba bõnɔ, dee dɛna nẽrba tɩ ba ka nõŋɛ, dee sisra taaba.

eng: But when God our saviors kindness and love appeared.
local: La Nawẽnnɛ n de tɩ Fãagra la n wa pa'alɛ nẽrsaalba a yel-sõnnɛ, la a nõŋlʋm na.

eng: he saved us because of his mercy, not because of righteous things we had done. He did it through the washing of new birth and the renewing by the Holy Spirit.
local: a fãagɛ tɩ mɛ, la, la dagɩ tɩn tõm tõon-sõma ĩyã, la de la a mẽŋa ninbãal-zʋa ĩyã tɩ a fãagɛ tɔ. A botɩ a Sɩa la n peege tõma sũure dẽgrɔ botɩ tɩ lebge nẽr-paalsɩ tara vɔm paalga.

eng: which God poured out upon us generously through Jesus Christ our savior.
local: La de la Azezi-krisi n de tɩ Fãagra la ĩyã, tɩ Nawẽnnɛ bɔ tɔ a Sɩa la sõŋa sõŋa.

eng: So, since we have been made righteous by his grace, we can inherit the hope for eternal life.
local: tɩ a yel-sõnnɛ na botɩ tõma masɛ a nẽŋam, lebge a kɔma wʋn yẽ vɔm n ka ba'asrɩ tɩ tõma tarɩ pʋtẽ'erɛ gu'ura la.

eng: This saying is reliable. And I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have come to believe in God might give careful attention to doing good. These things are good and useful for everyone.
local: Yetɔg-ẽna de la sɩra. Bɛla tɩ mam bɔɔra tɩ fʋ mõrgɛ pa'alɛ ba yel-bãma, tɩ nẽr-sɛba n bɔ Nawẽnnɛ sɩra la mõrgɛ tõnna tõon-sõma. Yel-bãma n ãn sõŋa dee tara yõorɔ bɔ'ɔra nẽrba.

eng: Avoid stupid controversies, genealogies, and fights about the Law, because they are useless and worthless.
local: La sãn dɛna nõke'en-yooro, la yaabdõma deto kãalgɔ, la nõkɛ'ɛma wẽ'a Zifdõma lɔɔ la yɛla, zãagɛ fʋ mẽŋa la bõn-bãma, se'ere n soe la, ba ka tarɩ yõorɔ, ba de la zãŋa.

eng: After a first and second warning, have nothing more to do with a person who causes conflict.
local: Nẽra sãn tara welgre sẽnna, fʋ kã'an ẽ nõorɛ ayi, tɩ a sãn ken zagsɛ, fʋ basɛ ẽ, la ya da le tara yetɔga la ẽ.

eng: because you know that someone like this is twisted and sinful—so they condemn themselves.
local: Tɩ fʋ mi tɩ nẽr-ẽŋa buuri bʋrgɛ mɛ basɛ sɩra sore, dee tõnna tõon-be'ero n pa'alɩ tɩ a kãn yẽ bʋʋrɔ.

eng: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, try to come to me in Nicopolis, because Ive decided to spend the winter there.
local: Mam wʋn tõm na Artemasɩ bɩɩ Atisiki fʋ zẽ'am, a sãn wa'am, fʋ nargɛ pãŋa wa'am mam zẽ'am Nikopoli, tɩ mam looge yɛm tɩ m bɔna la bilam tɩ ɔɔrɔ wakatɛ tole.

eng: Help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with enthusiasm so that they wont need anything.
local: Mõrgɛ bɩsɛ Azenaasɩ n de yetɔg-mita, la Apolɔsɩ sore sẽnnɛ na yelle, tɩ sɛla da pɔ'ɔgɛ ba.

eng: But our people should also learn to devote themselves to doing good in order to meet pressing needs so they arent unproductive.
local: Tõma nẽrba la masɛ mɛ tɩ ba zãsʋm tõnna tõon-sõma tɩ la sõŋɛ sɛba n boorɩ sõŋrɛ la, dee da vɔa vɔm n ka tarɩ yõorɔ.

eng: Everyone with me greets you; greet those who love us faithfully. Grace be with all of you.
local: Nẽr-sɛba n boe la mam na wuu pʋ'ʋsrɩ fɔ. Pʋ'ʋsɛ nẽr-sɛba n bɔ Azezi sɩra nõŋɛ tõma la. Nawẽnnɛ yel-sõnnɛ wʋn bɔna la ya wuu.

eng: From Paul, who is a prisoner for the cause of Christ Jesus, and our brother Timothy. To Philemon our dearly loved coworker.
local: Mam Apolɩ n boe yʋ'a deem Azezi-krisi yelle, la tɩ sɔbia Atimõtɩ n gʋlsɛ gõŋɔ wã bɔ'ɔra tɩ sɩr-sõŋɔ Afilmõ n de tɩ tõntõn-tadãana.

eng: Apphia our sister, Archippus our fellow soldier, and the church that meets in your house.
local: la tɩ tã Apɩa, la Arsipi n lagɩm na tõma yẽ nãmsgɔ Azezi tõoma pʋam na, la Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la n lagsrɩ fʋ yire pʋam na.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Tɩ Sɔ Nawẽnnɛ, la tɩ Zuudãana Azezi-krisi wʋn ẽŋɛ ya yel-sõnnɛ, dee bɔ ya sũ-mã'asʋm.

eng: Philemon, I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Mam pʋ'ʋsrɩ Nawẽnnɛ daarɛ woo a yel-sõnnɛ mɛ, dee tẽra fʋ yelle m pʋ'ʋsgɔ pʋam ka basra.

eng: because Ive heard of your love and faithfulness, which you have both for the Lord Jesus and for all Gods people.
local: Se'ere n soe la, mam wõm ban tɔgrɩ fõn bɔ tɩ Zuudãana Azezi sɩra se'em, la fõn tarɩ nõŋlʋm Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu ĩyã se'em.

eng: I pray that your partnership in the faith might become effective by an understanding of all that is good among us in Christ.
local: Mam sosrɩ Nawẽnnɛ tɩ fõn lagɩm na tõma bɔ Azezi-krisi sɩra la wʋn sẽnna nẽŋa, a wʋn basɛ tɩ fʋ bãŋɛ bõn-sõma sɛba wuu tɩ tɩ tarɩ Krisi doosgo pʋam.

eng: I have great joy and encouragement because of your love, since the hearts of Gods people are refreshed by your actions, my brother.
local: M sɔbia, fʋ nõŋlʋm na bɔ mam sũ-yẽlga zozo'e mɛ, dee bɔ mam bʋraanɛ, fõn botɩ Nawẽnnɛ nẽrba la wuu sũure mã'agɛ la ĩyã.

eng: Therefore, though I have enough confidence in Christ to command you to do the right thing.
local: Bɛla tɩ baa mam n tarɩ nɩ nõorɛ wʋn yele fo tɩ fʋ ẽŋɛ se'em Krisi ĩyã la, mam ka ẽŋɛ bɛla.

eng: I would rather appeal to you through love. I, Paul—an old man, and now also a prisoner for Christ Jesus.
local: mam sosrɩ fʋ la nõŋlʋm. La de la mam Apolɩ n de bʋra-yã'aŋa, mam boe la yʋ'a deem lɛɛlɛ wã Azezi-krisi yelle.

eng: appeal to you for my child Onesimus. I became his father in the faith during my time in prison.
local: Mam sosrɩ fʋ la A'onezim tɩ mam boe yʋ'a deem tɩ a sakɛ Azezi lebge mam bia la ĩyã.

eng: He was useless to you before, but now he is useful to both of us.
local: Kʋrʋm, a daan ka tarɩ yõorɔ bɔ fɔ, la lɛɛlɛ wã a yãŋa tarɩ yõorɔ mɛ bɔ fõn na mam.

eng: Im sending him back to you, which is like sending you my own heart.
local: Mam lebe tõnna ẽ na fõn zẽ'am, mam nõŋɛ ẽ na m sũure wuu.

eng: I considered keeping him with me so that he might serve me in your place during my time in prison because of the gospel.
local: Mam boorɩ nɩ tɩ a bɔna la mam zẽ'am to'oge fõn zẽ'a sõŋra mam, mam n ken bɔna yʋ'a deem Nawẽnnɛ kõ-yẽlga la ĩyã la.

eng: However, I didnt want to do anything without your consent so that your act of kindness would occur willingly and not under pressure.
local: La mam ka boorɩ tɩ m ẽŋɛ sɛla tɩ fõn sãn ka sakɛ, tɩ la da kãn dɛna mam mõrgɛ fʋ mɛ tɩ fʋ ẽŋɛ mam yel-sõnnɛ, la dɛna fʋ mẽŋa n boorɩ se'em.

eng: Maybe this is the reason that Onesimus was separated from you for a while so that you might have him back forever.
local: Tã tɩ A'onezim n daan basɛ fõn dee fõrgɛ wakatɛ fẽe la, la de la tɩ fʋ le to'oge ẽ tɩ a bɔna la fʋ wakatɛ wuu.

eng: no longer as a slave but more than a slave—that is, as a dearly loved brother. He is especially a dearly loved brother to me. How much more can he become a brother to you, personally and spiritually in the Lord!.
local: La a ka le dɛna fʋ to'oge ẽ tɩ a dɛna fʋ yamŋa mã'a, a gãnnɩ yamŋa mɛ, a yãŋa de la sɔbi-nõŋrɛ. Mam nõŋɛ ẽ mɛ halɩ zozo'e, la fõn wʋn nõŋɛ ẽ gãnna, se'ere n soe la, a de la fʋ yamŋa dee ken dɛna fʋ sɔbia Zuudãana doosgo pʋam.
